So all detail is important until circumstances render it redundant.
quotes.source: Know No Fear (Novel), Target//Acquisition, ch. 8, pg. 94

quotes.speaker: Roboute Guilliman, Primarch of the Ultramarines
quotes.text: What does not kill me... is not trying hard enough.
quotes.source: Know No Fear (Novel), Ushkul//Thu, ch. Two, pg. 348

quotes.speaker: Roboute Guilliman, Primarch of the Ultramarines
quotes.text: Whatever the Emperor's will is, be sure it will find you out.

quotes.speaker: Rogal Dorn, Primarch of the Imperial Fists
quotes.text: A warrior’s eye should seem to see everything: The movement of the enemy’s blade, the intent in their eyes, the doubt in their heart. But to achieve this, you must know where to place your gaze, and most of all, when to do so.

quotes.speaker: Rogal Dorn, Primarch of the Imperial Fists
quotes.text: Don't be insulted, but there is something very human about you, Loken, for an Astartes.
quotes.source: Horus Rising (Novel), Part One, ch. 6, pg. 136

quotes.speaker: Rogal Dorn, Primarch of the Imperial Fists
quotes.text: Give me a hundred Space Marines. Or failing that give me a thousand other troops.
quotes.source: Codex: Space Marines (4th Edition), pg. 2 - Introduction

quotes.speaker: Rogal Dorn, Primarch of the Imperial Fists
quotes.text: He said one word to me as I took him to the seat. "Now," I think He said. Or it might have been "No."
quotes.source: Ashes of the Imperium (Novel)(e-version), Part One, ch. 6, pg. 136

quotes.speaker: Rogal Dorn, Primarch of the Imperial Fists
quotes.text: If there is nobility remaining within Konrad's Legion, then it is hidden deeply beneath too many layers of twisted lusts, deviance, and disobedience. Their ways are foolish, ill-considered and a hindrance to the orderly flow of controlled war. The time is coming when the Night Lords must answer for their behaviour and be brought back into the doctrine of Imperial warfare, lest we lose them to their own deviant hungers.
quotes.source: Soul Hunter (Novel), Part One, ch. 6, pg. 123

quotes.speaker: Rogal Dorn, Primarch of the Imperial Fists
quotes.text: The Emperor has no like, Loken. There are no gods in this hollow universe to keep him company. So he made us, demi-gods, to stand beside him. I have never quite come to terms with my status. Does that surprise you? I see what I am capable of, and what is expected of me, and I shudder. The mere fact of me frightens me sometimes.
quotes.source: Horus Rising (Novel), Part One, ch. 6, pg. 134

quotes.speaker: Rogal Dorn, Primarch of the Imperial Fists
quotes.text: There is no enemy. The foe on the battlefield is merely the manifestation of that which we must overcome. He is doubt, and fear, and despair. Every battle is fought within. Conquer the battlefield that lies inside you, and the enemy disappears like the illusion he is.

quotes.speaker: Sanguinius, Primarch of the Blood Angels Legion
quotes.text: My son... step back, if you can. Step back from the abyss and return to us. I will save you. This is my fault. I am to blame. But I will amend this, if you help me. Will you help me, Alotros?
quotes.source: Fear to Tread (Novel), Prologue: Melchior, pg. 37

quotes.speaker: Saul Invictus, First Captain of the Ultramarines
quotes.text: Praise the sun that brings the dawn of our final doom.

quotes.speaker: Selmegh Zakhagi, White Scars Scout Sergeant
quotes.text: Be the water that seeps through the dam's cracks to begin its crumbling. Be the wind that flows through the cloak's fibres to chill the bones. Be the rock whose fall is the beginning of a landslide that sweeps all aside. Finally, be the spark, the spark that sets worlds aflame.

quotes.speaker: Sergeant Daegon Incursa, Invaders 1st Company
quotes.text: The deeds of one bold warrior can alter the course of a battle. I have four such men under my command and our every deed changes the shape of the galaxy.

quotes.speaker: Sergeant Rafen of the Blood Angels
quotes.text: This place was built to destroy something precious to us, something each of us shares, no matter which Primarch or Chapter we call our own. I speak of brotherhood. Bile has isolated us, severed all but the most cursory of contacts. He sows distrust and suspicion, wears you down with the slow grind of mindless days and tormented nights. The bastard wants you to believe you are forgotten. He lies. I am here to tell you that he lies and lies! Look within yourselves, brothers, and you will understand. You have been waiting for this day, even if you did not know it. This day, when you are reminded of who you are. My purpose here is the same as yours, to serve the God-Emperor and Holy Terra! Know that each of you is the harbinger of your own freedom! I say to you all that this day, we are not Blood Angels, Doom Eagles, Space Wolves, Taurans, Salamanders, Crimson Fists... We are one great legion, one heart and one mind! We are the Adeptus Astartes, the Space Marines, the war gods and terrible swift sword of our Emperor! We are His will, and we have always been so!

quotes.speaker: Shavorin Kalendus, Primaris Epistolary of the Raven Guard
quotes.text: Doubtless there are those who believe that such an insubstantial thing as darkness cannot compare to the explosive shells of a bolt rifle or the weighty impact of a thunder hammer. Let them. It only makes their dismay all the greater when their own shadow, trusted companion that it has been for all of their days, rises up like the spectre of damnation to wrap insubstantial fingers around their throat and begins to squeeze...
quotes.source: Codex Supplement: Raven Guard (8th Edition), pg. 62

quotes.speaker: Shoran Kord, Intercessor of the Imperial Fists
quotes.text: What great power it is, to split rock with thought! Never has my faith in Primarch and Emperor been more affirmed as when Epistolary Markov brought the fell keep of Arcton’s walls crashing down with but a glance. Within hours it was ours, all its depraved occupants dead.
quotes.source: Codex Supplement: Imperial Fists (8th Edition), pg. 62

quotes.speaker: Sighelm, Chaplain of the Celestial Lions
quotes.text: “Your future life shall be a series of trials, one after the other, until you attain the glory that is your due at the side of the Emperor. You shall face the hardest first, so that we know we are not wasting our time

quotes.speaker: Sigismund, First Captain of the Imperial Fists Legion and first High Marshal of the Black Templars
quotes.text: Nothing worthwhile is done without challenge, best to overcome it before plans are enacted.

quotes.speaker: Sigismund, First Captain of the Imperial Fists Legion and first High Marshal of the Black Templars
quotes.text: The more we spread the more we find. World after world. New worlds to conquer. Space is limitless, and so is our appetite to master it.
quotes.source: Horus Rising (Novel), Part One, ch. 6, pg. 131

quotes.speaker: Sigismund, First Captain of the Imperial Fists Legion and first High Marshal of the Black Templars
quotes.text: We will spend our lives fighting to secure this Imperium, and then I fear we will spend the rest of our days fighting to keep it intact. There is such involving darkness amongst the stars. Even when the Imperium is complete, there will be no peace. We will be obliged to fight on to preserve what we have fought to establish. Peace is a vain wish. Our crusade may one day adopt another name, but it will never truly end. In the far future, there will be only war.
quotes.source: Horus Rising (Novel), Part One, ch. 6, pg. 132

quotes.speaker: Skold Greypelt, of the Space Wolves
quotes.text: Do you ever go into a fight thinking there's no point giving my best, I'll get another chance later? We only ever get one shot, Marlin. Life is one shot. Making it count is all that matters.

quotes.speaker: Skold Greypelt, of the Space Wolves
quotes.text: It is the way of Fenris. We stay as long as we can. Fight as hard as we can. Kill as much as we can. Only when we can do no more do we move on.

quotes.speaker: Skold Greypelt, of the Space Wolves
quotes.text: You ask a lot of questions, Marlin. You know what I think? I think you need another drink.

quotes.speaker: Space Hulk (Novella), 00.06.99
quotes.text: There are more things in the darkness than man can ever count.

quotes.speaker: Space Hulk (Novella), 00.06.99
quotes.text: There is no sacrifice more noble than to give your life for a cause in which you truly believe. In all the long millennia of Human history, there has never been a worthier cause than that of the Imperium.

quotes.speaker: Spears of the Emperor (Novel), Book Three, pg. 176
quotes.text: Though we are broken, our oaths yet bind us. We are the Lions of Elysium, and as long as a single warrior in our heraldry draws breath, we will uphold our vow to watch over Elara’s Veil. For the fallen Scorpions. For the Spears still fighting. For the Adeptus Vaelarii.
quotes.source: Ekene Dubaku, Chapter Master of the Celestial Lions

quotes.speaker: Spiccare, Sergeant of the Blood Angels 1st Company
quotes.text: We ride upon the wings of the storm. What hope of escape can our foes possibly have?

quotes.speaker: Statement of fact, Second Book of Chantings
quotes.text: Inscription upon the Arcus Daemonica, attributed to the Emperor of Mankind

quotes.speaker: Statement of fact, Second Book of Chantings
quotes.text: There is only the Emperor, and he is our Shield and Protector.
quotes.source: Warhammer 40,000 Chapter Approved - The Book of the Astronomican, pg. 78

quotes.speaker: Surgeon-Commander Grigor Markhava
quotes.text: Master of the Apothecarion Aslon Marr
quotes.source: White Dwarf 102 (UK), pg. 75 (republished as Warhammer 40,000: Compendium, pg. 29)

quotes.speaker: Surgeon-Commander Grigor Markhava
quotes.text: The duty of the Medic, my Brethren, is a sacred one. We embody the Emperor's divine will and his holy purpose. We bring death and we bring life. Let those true to Humanity's cause give thanks for our work. Let the impure bow down before our swords!
quotes.source: White Dwarf 102 (UK), pg. 74 (republished as Warhammer 40,000: Compendium, pg. 28)

quotes.speaker: Syras Ordin, Lieutenant of the Raven Guard
quotes.text: We are the shadows that gather around you. We are the darkness that presses close. We are the footstep where there should be none, the sudden blade at your throat, the fear that steals through your body when it is already too late. We are the Raven Guard. We are death.
quotes.source: Codex Supplement: Raven Guard (8th Edition), pg. 52

quotes.speaker: Ta’Ghel, Inceptor Sergeant of the Salamanders
quotes.text: Temper your haste with wisdom, brothers. Should mission priorities suddenly change, we adapt without shattering. We advance and endure where it is required. We strike as a burning comet to sunder their works and we roar our drake-breath from Nocturne’s heart at the moment the inferno is called for. This foe in all their nefarious variety will not long last.

quotes.speaker: Tarik Torgaddon, Captain of the Luna Wolves 2nd Company
quotes.text: The answer, always, is the Wolves of Fenris, because they are clinically insane.
quotes.source: Horus Rising (Novel), Part One, ch. 6, pg. 132

quotes.speaker: Tarik Torgaddon, Captain of the Luna Wolves 2nd Company
quotes.text: You are a base-born cur!
quotes.source: Horus Rising (Novel), Part Two, ch. 6, pg. 297

quotes.speaker: Techmarine Simagus of the Black Templars
quotes.text: Battle Litany of the Space Wolves
quotes.source: Warhammer 40,000 Chapter Approved - The Book of the Astronomican, pg. 22

quotes.speaker: Techmarine Simagus of the Black Templars
quotes.text: Many great legends lived before Brother Rammius, but most are unmourned and are consigned to unremembered history. Such shall not be the Rammius' fate, for he lives on in glory and, with our ministrations, shall do so for a thousand years and more.

quotes.speaker: Telamon, Brother-Captain of the Crimson Fists
quotes.text: Those of the xenos that our Predators do not crush beheanth their armoured tread, we shall strike down ourselves with avenging bolt and righteous blade. Onward Crimson Fists, ever onward!
quotes.source: Imperial Armour Volume Two - Second Edition: War Machines of the Adeptus Astartes, pg. 60

quotes.speaker: Telion, Scout Sergeant of the Ultramarines 10th Company
quotes.text: Forget all your preconceptions of war, of battle-lines clashing in the churned ground. Your mission is to attack before the foe even realises that the war has begun, to strike hard at those vital weaknesses that all armies possess, but that no commander will admit to. Under my tutelage you will learn how to seek out such fragilities and smite them with every weapon at your disposal. Master these duties and I will have nothing more to teach, and you will truly be a Space Marine.

quotes.speaker: Telion, Scout Sergeant of the Ultramarines 10th Company
quotes.text: The Adepts of Mars can provide us with all the advanced firearms and blades and armour they like, but the most important equipment any warrior of the Adeptus Astartes wields is that which lies behind his eyes and that which beats within his breast.

quotes.speaker: Thar Ariak Hraldir, " Wyrmblade," Wolf Priest of the Space Wolves
quotes.text: It was the Allfather who created Leman Russ, the primogenitor of the Vlka Fenryka, and the Allfather who fashioned the Legion that served under his name. For every Legion he created, there was a purpose. Some were blessed with the power to build, or the skill to administer, or the capacity for stealth. Our gift was different. We were made to destroy. Our whole being is destruction. Such was the will of the Allfather. He made us not to construct empires, but to murder them. We were bred to perform the tasks that no other Legion could, to fight with such extravagance that even our brother warriors would shrink from treachery in the knowledge of what we, the Rout, would do to them.
quotes.source: Battle of the Fang (Novel), ch. Nineteen, pgs. 418-419

quotes.speaker: The Art of Warhammer Video Games,pg. 28, Warhammer 40,000: Dawn of War III
quotes.text: In this dark place, in this dark hour, we will stand against the enemies of the Emperor. And they will know that not even here on this desecrated infernal rock will we suffer the existence of the heretic. Not now. Not ever.
quotes.source: Gabriel Angelos, Captain, Chapter Master of the Blood Ravens

quotes.speaker: The Art of Warhammer Video Games,pg. 28, Warhammer 40,000: Dawn of War III
quotes.text: Stretched thin, the Imperial Guard is barely keeping order in the major population centers sacrificing their lives long enough to keep back the green tide of the Orks. They are truly warriors of the Emperor.

quotes.speaker: The Art of Warhammer Video Games,pg. 28, Warhammer 40,000: Dawn of War III
quotes.text: While the enemies of the Emperor still draw breath, there can be no peace.

quotes.speaker: The Book of Faith, Adeptus Astartes
quotes.text: At battle's end, speak the Liturgy in a clear voice. Respect the bravery of the living. Give the Rite of Passage to the fallen. Honour the battle gear of the dead. To do all this with reverence, even when exhausted by battle and weary from the field, is the duty of a Chaplain. It is his burden and satisfaction.
quotes.source: White Dwarf 108 (UK), pgs. 50(republished as Warhammer 40,000: Compendium, pg. 25)

quotes.speaker: The Book of Faith, Adeptus Astartes
quotes.text: Catechism of the Xenos, Extract from the Third Book of Indoctrination

quotes.speaker: The Emperor of Mankind
quotes.text: They shall be my finest warriors, these men who give of themselves to me. Like clay I shall mould them, and in the furnace of war forge them. They will be of iron will and steely muscle. In great armour shall I clad them and with the mightiest guns will they be armed. They will be untouched by plague or disease, no sickness will blight them. They will have tactics, strategies and machines so that no foe can best them in battle. They are my bulwark against the Terror. They are the Defenders of Humanity. They are my Space Marines and they shall know no fear.
quotes.source: The Horus Heresy Book One - Betrayal, pg. 26

quotes.speaker: The Honoured (Novella), ch. Five
quotes.text: For the Emperor stands behind his sons as the primarchs behind their captains. It is a captain’s duty to place legionary lives in harm’s way before his own. There is too little glory in the galaxy to go around and officers must be generous in the trust they place in others – for one day such brothers must be captains too.

quotes.speaker: The Honoured (Novella), ch. Five
quotes.text: Many things about this dark new age have caused me to question all that my father and I tried to build. Many things have disappointed me. The Chapter Master of my loyal and noble Ultramarines is most emphatically not one of them.

quotes.speaker: The Honoured (Novella), ch. Five
quotes.text: Surrender. Retreat. Failure. These things are anathema to me just as they are to my sons. The Imperium is a realm beset, yet still the Emperor sits upon his throne and still the spirit of Humanity burns strong. Our destiny lies not in surrender but in conquest; not in retreat but in relentless advance; not in failure but in victory, and the survival of the Emperor’s realm! So now do I swear.

quotes.speaker: The Honoured (Novella), ch. Five
quotes.text: Vigilus shall not be allowed to fall

quotes.speaker: The Honoured (Novella), ch. Two
quotes.text: I am the fist, clenched tight in ceramite, smashing with the force of a Legion. I am the blade, awaiting my foe’s flesh, as keen as the Emperor could make me. I am the bolt, fired from afar – fleet and true, an end to all who stand before the Imperium of Man.

quotes.speaker: The Prophesy of Frode
quotes.text: The Bear shall take upthe mantle of Gatekeeper,and the Lost Kin returnto the Realms of the Man.Brother shall slay brother,as at the Dawn of Time.But the Were-kin stand aloofTheir task set in stone before them.The Son of the Traitor shall lay wasteFirst the Gate, then the PalaceThe Children of Russ shall oppose himOr perish, their names reviled forall time.Now is the time, mighty Wolf,Your hunt is nearing its endYour quarry is set before youYour saga shall be sung for all time.

quotes.speaker: Traviola, Sergeant of the Blood Angels 2nd Company
quotes.text: Though I long for the heady joys of the blade as much as any of my brothers, command of such overwhelming firepower offers a satisfaction all of its own.

quotes.speaker: Traviola, Sergeant of the Blood Angels 2nd Company
quotes.text: Tybael, of the Blood Angels 2nd Company

quotes.speaker: Troos, Marine Psyker(presumably White Scars)
quotes.text: Arm yourselves, fools, the enemy are within us!
quotes.source: Warhammer 40,000 Chapter Approved - The Book of the Astronomican, pg. 66

quotes.speaker: Ubaldo, Captain Blood Angels
quotes.text: My battle-brothers have a mission and an enemy to kill. By the Throne's Light, that is all the Emperor's Angels require!
quotes.source: The Art of Warhammer Video Games,pg. 34, Space Hulk: Tactics Classics

quotes.speaker: Ulfric Hoodclaw, Space Wolves
quotes.text: Guard your tongue, whelp, lest I cut it out. I care not for your moon-touched ramblings, nor for the tales of your grandmother. Mark this well - of the 13th Company we do not speak.

quotes.speaker: Ultheris, Battle-Brother Subjugators 7th Company
quotes.text: These Imperial Guard officers would kill their foes with their words if they could. Enough talk, to war brother!

quotes.speaker: Ultramarines: His Proud Sons
quotes.text: Ultramarines - A Warhammer 40,000 Movie, (1:10:34) End Credits Song

quotes.speaker: Unknown Chaplain of the XVII Legion
quotes.text: What is true faith? Is it belief in the absence of empirical truth? No. Faith is a manifestation of will, it is the fealty-price given in the presence of actual godhood and the only protection from its divine wrath. That is true faith.

quotes.speaker: Unknown Great Khan of the White Scars
quotes.text: This is why we were created. We are the Judgement of the free on the corrupt. We are the vengeance of heaven. While one of us lives to wield a blade, our enemies will now know peace.
quotes.source: Codex Supplement: White Scars (8th Edition), pg. 20

quotes.speaker: Unknown legionary
quotes.text: Though the battle had ended and the enemy was far from the reach of our blades, most of us didn’t come back from the Urgall Depression. Even those men who escaped, those pitiful few, even they didn’t come back. They’re still there now. We all are, fighting for our lives.

quotes.speaker: Unknown Librarian
quotes.text: Bolters? Chainswords? All fine weapons, however I wield a far more dangerous power.
quotes.source: Magic: The Gathering's Universes Beyond Warhammer 40,000- Epistolary Librarian

quotes.speaker: Unknown Sergeant of the Ultramarines
quotes.text: The Scions of Guilliman are many. We raise our banners above countless battlefronts and fly them atop battlements from Quintarn to Callathoria. We charge at the forefront of attacks unnumbered and crush foes beyond measure beneath our armoured boots. Without us, the Imperium would long have fallen into ruin. With us, it is unassailable.

quotes.speaker: Uriel Ventris, Ultramarines Captain
quotes.text: And you are wrong.

quotes.speaker: Uriel Ventris, Ultramarines Captain
quotes.text: But if you fail, Pavonis will die. By my hand or that of de Valtos.

quotes.speaker: Uriel Ventris, Ultramarines Captain
quotes.text: I have seen my share of death, both honourable and despicable, and yes, I know that war is a brutal, bloody business capable of bringing out the best and the worst in men. This is a harsh, dangerous galaxy, with untold terrors lurking in the dark to devour us, but the minute we turn on our own kind and murder them, we might as well take a blade to our throats.
quotes.source: The Killing Ground (Novel), ch. Eighteen, pg. 277

quotes.speaker: Uriel Ventris, Ultramarines Captain
quotes.text: Without the Codex Astartes, the Imperium wouldn't have survived the aftermath of the Great Heresy. It binds every one of the thousand Chapters of Space Marines together, and gives us a common cause, a connection to the past and to one another. Every Chapter, whether they acknowledge it or not, owes its very existence to the Codex Astartes.

quotes.speaker: Urloch, Intercessor of the Iron Hands
quotes.text: It is as Master of the Forge Malkaan Feirros says: “A Titan is a mighty weapon of the Omnissiah, but without the fires of its reactor it is but cold, dead metal.”
quotes.source: Codex Supplement: Iron Hands (8th Edition), pg. 39

quotes.speaker: Ursus Kane, Captain of the Iron Hands' 3rd Company
quotes.text: To kill your foe, you must understand your foe.

quotes.speaker: Varnus, Chaplain of the Ultramarines
quotes.text: Come all you Xeno scum and fallen heretics! Come face the one true might of the universe and wither under the Golden Throne's gaze!
quotes.source: Dawn of War: Winter Assault Classics

quotes.speaker: Varro Tigurius, Chief Librarian of the Ultramarines
quotes.text: Each path must be chosen with care,Lest disaster swallow us whole.

quotes.speaker: Varro Tigurius, Chief Librarian of the Ultramarines
quotes.text: It cannot be considered a gift, to peer into the Warp and unravel the possibilities of the future that are, that might be, and that must be prevented. Nor can the burden of a weapon, that each of my brothers looks upon with girded revulsion, be called a gift. No, Master, I do not think my psychic prowess a gift... but a tool. Whether by a quirk of fate, or the will of the Emperor, I possess a weapon the like of which can turn the tide, not just in a battle but in the course of history. To withhold it, to flinch from its use or deny it would not just be counter-productive, it would be heresy. But if it is a gift, it is a cruel one.
quotes.source: Warlords of the Dark Millennium: Tigurius (Background Book), pg. 3

quotes.speaker: Varro Tigurius, Chief Librarian of the Ultramarines
quotes.text: Never before or since have I seen fighting such as I witnessed when that host fell upon the Orks. Seizing the moment, I regrouped my Company and led them once more into the fray, yet there was little work for us, for the greenskins lacked stomach for the fight. Soon we secured the great bastion once more and without further loss. Of the dark brotherhood there was no sign.

quotes.speaker: Varro Tigurius, Chief Librarian of the Ultramarines
quotes.text: The fate of this distant world is worth a thousand others. If it falls, if the Nachmund Gauntlet collapses, the Imperium Nihilus is all but lost to us. The empire of Terra will soon follow.

quotes.speaker: Vel'cona, Chief Librarian of the Salamanders
quotes.text: I can pulp your flesh and snap your bones in less than a second, and without so much as lifting a finger. What is the power of technology compared to that?

quotes.speaker: Vordin Krayn, Shadow Captain of the Raven Guard 3rd Company
quotes.text: Do you feel that, proud xenos? The talons of the Raven Guard are closing about your throat. But have no fear. It will all be over soon.
quotes.source: Codex Supplement: Raven Guard (8th Edition), pg. 14

quotes.speaker: Vorgha Khan, Khan of the White Scars 8th Company
quotes.text: Many of our cousins refuse to retreat. They see it as dishonourable. They are fools. Ten thousand victories have started with a retreat. The only dishonour is in not coming back.
quotes.source: Codex Supplement: White Scars (8th Edition), pg. 19

quotes.speaker: Vorn Saperin, Intercessor of the Imperial Fists
quotes.text: To be bequeathed with Dorn’s legacy is the single greatest burden a warrior can bear. But it is also the greatest honour. Never do I fail to give thanks for it.
quotes.source: Codex Supplement: Imperial Fists (8th Edition), pg. 50

quotes.speaker: Vos Delorn, Captain of the Raven Guard 9th Company
quotes.text: Do you think it was easy, for Corax’s followers to break their shackles? Do you think it was easy, to fight day and night for the emancipation of an entire world, and then an entire galaxy? Our story is one of hardship, betrayal and vengeance. You will learn what these things mean to the Raven Guard thrice over, and then you shall learn them again.
quotes.source: Codex Supplement: Raven Guard (8th Edition), pg. 45

quotes.speaker: Voxanitor, Apothecary of the Absolvers
quotes.text: I can scarcely imagine what inspired Horus to this madness. In truth, the very fact of it frightens me. For if even the best of us can falter, what does that mean for the rest? Lord Manus will lead us in. Seven Legions against his four. Horus will regret this rebellion.

quotes.speaker: Voxanitor, Apothecary of the Absolvers
quotes.text: To be more than human is; at the same time, to be less than human. Within us is the capacity for greatness. We are warriors, but we must also be saviours. Our ultimate goal is self- obsoletion, for when our task is successful and peace, not war, reigns in the galaxy, our usefulness will be ended and with it us too.

quotes.speaker: Voxanitor, Apothecary of the Absolvers
quotes.text: Were anyone other to suggest our exalted gene-seed be mutated, I would have their head, Inquisitor. I respect your authority, and will permit your snooping zealots to pry but one time — but know that this will not be forgotten.

quotes.speaker: Voxanitor, Apothecary of the Absolvers
quotes.text: You have suffered. I know this. You have come to the abyss, and almost surrendered yourselves to it. That changes now. I am father, general, lord and mentor. I shall teach you if I can, and pass on the knowledge I have gained. Honour, self-sacrifice, self-reliance, brotherhood. It is our Promethean creed and all must adhere to it if we are to prosper. Let this be the first lesson...

quotes.speaker: We must scour them from the stars before they do same to us.- about the Tyranid menace
quotes.text: Consumption, #039 card of the "The Great Devourer", expansion to Conquest Card Game, Fantasy Flight Games(last accessed 11 July 2015)

quotes.speaker: We must scour them from the stars before they do same to us.- about the Tyranid menace
quotes.text: They are an enemy unnumbered. They are hunger incarnate, a rapacious invading foe that we cannot reason with, cannot bribe or trick and whose spirit we cannot break. The Tyranids will keep coming until every living thing in the galaxy is slain, or they are. I will see to it that it is the latter that occurs.

quotes.speaker: White Dwarf 100 (UK), pg. 7 (republished as Warhammer 40,000: Compendium, pg. 59) Warhammer 40,000 5th Edition Rulebook,pg. 72
quotes.text: For Ultramar! CHARGE!

quotes.speaker: White Dwarf 100 (UK), pg. 7 (republished as Warhammer 40,000: Compendium, pg. 59) Warhammer 40,000 5th Edition Rulebook,pg. 72
quotes.text: Know this, son of Guilliman, the father of our Chapter watches over us always. He knows your soul, your strength and, aye, even your fears.

quotes.speaker: White Dwarf 100 (UK), pg. 7 (republished as Warhammer 40,000: Compendium, pg. 59) Warhammer 40,000 5th Edition Rulebook,pg. 72
quotes.text: Know this, son of Guilliman. The father of our Chapter watches over us always. He knows your soul, your strengths and, aye, even your fears. I share your pain at the loss of Brother-Captain Idaeus, but to dishonour his name with grief is wrong. He gave his life so that his battle-brothers would live and the enemies of the Emperor would be defeated. A warrior can ask for no better death than that. Captain Idaeus was the senior officer, and you were duty bound to follow his orders when they were given. The chain of command must not be broken or we are nothing. Discipline and order are everything on the battlefield and the army that lives by that credo will always triumph.
quotes.source: Nightbringer (Novel)- Ultramarines: The Omnibus, ch. 2, pg. 47

quotes.speaker: White Dwarf 100 (UK), pg. 7 (republished as Warhammer 40,000: Compendium, pg. 59) Warhammer 40,000 5th Edition Rulebook,pg. 72
quotes.text: The War will be decided here, where the planet's defenses are strongest.
quotes.source: Magic: The Gathering's Universes Beyond Warhammer 40,000- Command Tower

quotes.speaker: White Dwarf 100 (UK), pg. 7 (republished as Warhammer 40,000: Compendium, pg. 59) Warhammer 40,000 5th Edition Rulebook,pg. 72
quotes.text: Warriors of Ultramar! This is where we make our stand. If death is to be our fate, then we shall meet it with the Emperor’s word on our lips and his light in our eyes. If we must die, we will die; but we shall never yield.
quotes.source: Warhammer 40,000 8th Edition Rulebook,pg. 236 Warhammer 40,000 5th Edition Rulebook,pg. 43

quotes.speaker: White Dwarf 100 (UK), pg. 7 (republished as Warhammer 40,000: Compendium, pg. 59) Warhammer 40,000 5th Edition Rulebook,pg. 72
quotes.text: We are the Ultramarines, the sons of Guilliman. Whilst we draw breath, we stand. Whilst we stand, we fight. Whilst we fight, we prevail. Nothing shall stay our wrath.

quotes.speaker: White Dwarf 100 (UK), pg. 7 (republished as Warhammer 40,000: Compendium, pg. 59) Warhammer 40,000 5th Edition Rulebook,pg. 72
quotes.text: We pray for our brethren who pilot the Dreadnoughts. Though they take new form, their souls, and their weapon mounts, remain pure.
quotes.source: Marneus Calgar, Chapter Master of the Ultramarines

quotes.speaker: White Dwarf 100 (UK), pg. 7 (republished as Warhammer 40,000: Compendium, pg. 59) Warhammer 40,000 5th Edition Rulebook,pg. 72
quotes.text: Whilst we stand, we fight. Whilst we fight, we prevail. Nothing shall stay our wrath.

quotes.speaker: White Dwarf 100 (UK), pg. 7 (republished as Warhammer 40,000: Compendium, pg. 59) Warhammer 40,000 5th Edition Rulebook,pg. 72
quotes.text: You all heard Varro's words. The daemon is vulnerable, exposed, and we have one chance to end this. Right here and right now, the fate of Ultramar is in our hands. You are the best and bravest of your Chapter, and though we may die in these mountains, we will die in service to something greater than blood, something greater than land. We fight for what we know is right. I will lead you in that fight, and all I ask is that you fight like the heroes you are!

quotes.speaker: White Dwarf 100 (UK), pg. 7 (republished as Warhammer 40,000: Compendium, pg. 59) Warhammer 40,000 5th Edition Rulebook,pg. 72
quotes.text: You talk of disaster, and I know well why you might. A hundred battles, a billion corpses, with more joining the carrion pile with each passing second. There is panic, cowardice, and nightmarish desperation in every hab-block – and fuel is being poured on the fire wherever you look. Yet this planet is still defended by the Imperium’s finest. We hold the keys to its survival. I assure you, we will be equal to the task, no matter what sacrifice it takes

quotes.speaker: Wrath & Glory Core Rulebook, pg. 70
quotes.text: They butchered the lot; ten angels in white armour against a hundred red daemons. By the end, I couldn’t tell what was what, there was so much blood. Last thing standing only had one arm, still holding a sword; big, hulking thing comes towards me, an’ I says ‘Are you gonna kill me too?’ an’ this deep voice says ‘No. I am going to protect you’.
quotes.source: Aral Vode, Aspirant to the Absolvers Chapter

quotes.speaker: Xarius, Lord General Imperial Guard
quotes.text: Soldiers? I hardly think they fit that description. Do you know how they make them, Threlnan? No, of course you don't. They find some barbaric planet where children fight before they can walk, and they hunt down the most bloodthirsty killers. They recruit them when they're twelve, thirteen, fourteen, with all that hate and that arrogance, just at the age when you think you're bulletproof and nothing can kill you. Then they keep them like that, give them a gun and some armour, and point them at the nearest enemy. They're not soldiers, colonel, they're maniacs. They won't answer to anyone save their own kind.

quotes.speaker: Zamorael, Sergeant of the Dark Angels Ravenwing
quotes.text: To hunt the Fallen, we must be strong, swift and silent. We must place trust in our sworn brothers alone, and show neither mercy nor hesitation to any who seek to obstruct or betray us.

quotes.speaker: — Traditional battle cant, Serberys Cadre Upsilon-Rho, Avachrus
quotes.text: Tireless shall we chase our prey ++ Merciless shall we strike our foes ++ Sharp shall be our talons ++ And bright our flames ++ We are shining steel and boundless power ++ We are the cold fury of the Machine God ++ Where we ride, all doubt perishes

quotes.speaker: 7-Cyclae, Skitarii Alpha Primus, Stygies VIII
quotes.text: Forgive me, O Spirit, for this trespass. I intervene in your blessed functions only to fulfil my own. Together may we serve the Omnissiah in His great design.

quotes.speaker: 7-Cyclae, Skitarii Alpha Primus, Stygies VIII
quotes.text: It is the privilege of cogs to be ground down that the machine may run, magos.

quotes.speaker: A Tech-Priest on Mordian explaining all that is holy in the sound of the vox.
quotes.text: Within are the voices of the dead. Their phantoms travel in great waves from the holy emitter. They travel to the edge of the universe, no faster than light. Every word spoken into a vox will live forever, here.

quotes.speaker: Acolytum Friedisch Adum Silip Qvo
quotes.text: Organic life is the Machine-God’s greatest accomplishment within the scope of the Great Work, all praise He who is three-in-one. By giving us life within an organic shell he presents us with the means and opportunity to improve upon physicality, as is his divine plan. He grants us complex weakness so we might learn metallic strength, and ascend to his level of machinic perfection.

quotes.speaker: Adept Koriel Zeth, Forge Mistress
quotes.text: It is my great regret that we live in an age that is proud of machines that think and suspicious of people who try to.

quotes.speaker: Admonitions Mechanae 3:16
quotes.text: Seek not the words of the xenos, lest they infect us with blasphemy.

quotes.speaker: Aetheric Manuscripts Appendix 71
quotes.text: Without a Standard Model, there is naught but madness and Chaos among the stars.

quotes.speaker: Amalanthians 9.41
quotes.text: Thus does the Enemy seek to crush our spirit, for our souls are our most potent weapon.

quotes.speaker: Amaranthine Verses 78.12
quotes.text: No task that is easy is ever worthwhile.

quotes.speaker: Amarinthine Admonitions
quotes.text: If it resembles a heretic, if it speaks like a heretic, and if it be redolent to the nose, as if like a heretic, then a heretic it will be!

quotes.speaker: Amarinthine Admonitions
quotes.text: We fight the foe’s battle for him, when we take his words into our hearts.

quotes.speaker: Antonine Musings 901.45
quotes.text: Failure is unique among sin, in that we can turn it into a virtue when it drives us to succeed.

quotes.speaker: Aphorisms 25
quotes.text: Better in ignorance than in heresy.

quotes.speaker: Aphorisms 31
quotes.text: Bring guns as well as prayers.

quotes.speaker: Aphorisms 43
quotes.text: Purify it with flames, for this is the wish of the Omnissiah!

quotes.speaker: Aphorisms 56
quotes.text: Look not upon the alien, for the alien looks back.

quotes.speaker: Aphorisms 61.2
quotes.text: Let knowledge serve only man, and let that which does not remain in darkness.

quotes.speaker: Aphorisms 62
quotes.text: Do not ask the Omnissiah for a pleasant existence, ask Him for the strength to overcome our tribulations.

quotes.speaker: Aphorisms 7.1
quotes.text: There are horrors in this galaxy that only faith and steel can overcome, and that we should be grateful we shall never fully understand.

quotes.speaker: Aphorisms 7.31
quotes.text: Grant a coward the excuse to retreat from the battlefield and he will never fight again.

quotes.speaker: Aphorisms 712
quotes.text: When the spirit is neglected, the body falters and the mind is corrupted.

quotes.speaker: Aphorisms 793
quotes.text: Blessed is the ignorance that wise men choose for themselves.

quotes.speaker: Aphorisms 82
quotes.text: When the enemy seeks to break our spirit, meet his blasphemy with flame!

quotes.speaker: Aphorisms 90
quotes.text: A tech-priest does not have hunches. He immerses himself in vast knowledge that is the Omnissiah s gift, and takes whatever course of action is revealed thereby. No matter how onerous it may be.

quotes.speaker: Aphorisms 94.13
quotes.text: The Enemy rushes to action, when our ministrations cause him fear

quotes.speaker: Aphorisms 96.9
quotes.text: Verily it is written that the Omnissiah grants His blessing to those who come well-equipped with explosives.

quotes.speaker: Aphorisms 97
quotes.text: If it is worth doing, it is worth doing to completion.

quotes.speaker: Aphorisms of the Logic-Saints 7.91
quotes.text: In the presence of the xenos lies the invisible miasma of corruption.

quotes.speaker: Appendix Heuristica 73.90
quotes.text: And we shall cast them down, that corrupt by their presence; We shall break the teeth of the xenos that would swallow us whole.

quotes.speaker: Arch-Magos Karolinious Benz, Magos-Draco of the Lords Dragon
quotes.text: The phrase 'be seeing you' has a different meaning for us, my dear Inquisitor Caidin. When we say this, it is to be taken quite… literally.

quotes.speaker: Archmagos Dominus Belisarius Cawl
quotes.text: I’m Belisarius Cawl and I can do anything.

quotes.speaker: Archmagos Dominus Belisarius Cawl
quotes.text: Our creed says the flesh is weak, and so it is. That is why we strive to improve upon it and replace it, as the Machine God desires. But we abandon His numinous gifts at our peril. To give up one’s soul is the great sin of my religion. The soul must be understood, not despised.

quotes.speaker: Archmagos Dominus Belisarius Cawl
quotes.text: The Omnissiah knows my work, even if others are too blind to accept an opus of genius.

quotes.speaker: Archmagos Nerovian
quotes.text: Less exalted minds might waver to learn the secrets of the xenos. But we are stronger. We are better.

quotes.speaker: Archmagos Takashi Ludd; Castigation upon the Logistica Corpus
quotes.text: Thy shall not suffer a Machine to Think! For ruin shall be its purpose and accursed be the work.

quotes.speaker: Archmagos Ultima Cryol
quotes.text: In ancient times, men built wonders, laid claim to the stars and sought to better themselves for the good of all. But we are much wiser now.

quotes.speaker: Archmagos Veneratus Haelon
quotes.text: Hark not the alien's words, lest ye unknowingly repeat them.

quotes.speaker: Archmagos Veneratus Hieraticus
quotes.text: Let the stench of corruption be swept aside by the sweet winds of faith.

quotes.speaker: Arcturia-Alpha, Praetor Electroid Electro-priest
quotes.text: The Omnissiah's design is flawless and has no contradiction. Any discrepancies in our interpretation of the universe merely confirm the perfection of the Omnissiah's design and our own informational inadequacy.

quotes.speaker: Armageddon Verses 13.90
quotes.text: They need not rend us with their blades. They have but to make us witness them, and thereby can we fall.

quotes.speaker: Attributed to an unknown Genetor
quotes.text: Everything organic we know of is simply machinery, in one form or another. Tendons replace pistons; flesh in the place of steel; blood is simply biological coolant. To deny this and shun it is more than just Mechanicus orthodoxy – it is idiocy.

quotes.speaker: Avelornians 5.91
quotes.text: Fragile indeed are the tools of the righteous.

quotes.speaker: Bartolomus Virellan, Magos Biologis
quotes.text: The sword was not invented to be wielded for its own sake. Its creators knew that fighting must be done in order to live. Therefor, fighting is subservient to living. Therefor, the sword is subservient to the quill. Therefore, the sword holder is subservient to the quill holder. The warrior's role is to serve, and those who serve are more expendable than those served. Many may die to preserve my labours, and that is the natural order of things.

quotes.speaker: Benediction Binharic of the Omnissiah- excerpt
quotes.text: The Magi of the forge-temples are the blessed intermediaries. They are sanctified in the augurs of the Machine God by their knowledge. In pure and logical benediction do they grant us the word of the Omnissiah.

quotes.speaker: Binary Hierarch Gethsemorr
quotes.text: The weak in mind will seek to understand the xenos. The strong in mind will destroy them, and bless their ignorance.

quotes.speaker: Cannot unless you Canticle v.34
quotes.text: The only will of the Machine Spirit is that of the Omnissian technologies, for the Xenos will deceive you and tempt you, but you will not falter, for you are a Priest.

quotes.speaker: Cant-Mantra of the Datasmith Prioris
quotes.text: Blessed is he who guides the blameless machine, trusted is he who carries the sacred wafer. (Partial)

quotes.speaker: Canticles Borealis 6.15
quotes.text: Inefficiency is a slope whereupon one slides ever downwards, by degrees, until one reaches the nadir unknowing.

quotes.speaker: Canticles Flamminia 713
quotes.text: When we muse on the works of the enemy, we invite him into our minds.

quotes.speaker: Canticles Infomemetatric, 964th Codeline
quotes.text: Flesh makes us mighty. Faith makes us strong. The machine and the flesh, alloyed, serving as one the holy purpose of the Omnissiah. Thus must it ever be.

quotes.speaker: Canticles Logica 6.41
quotes.text: Where corruption remains, men will fall.

quotes.speaker: Canticles of Gethsemenoth Line 87
quotes.text: Let the weaker in mind follow the words of the strong!

quotes.speaker: Canticles of Mars 79.12
quotes.text: Rejoice. Give thanks. For we are but one step now from triumph.

quotes.speaker: Canticles of Rousing- excerpt
quotes.text: Let chime ring out! Part the veil of circuit and gear. For now is the hour of motion.

quotes.speaker: Canticles of War Doctrina Alpha- excerpt
quotes.text: Broadcast the psalms of war to drive the macroclades to triumph.

quotes.speaker: Canto-Graius, sub-verse 847
quotes.text: Just as the blessed industry of the Omnissiah is ever-unending, so too must be the devotion of His servants. With motion do we offer Him worship, and with toil, and with tireless labour.

quotes.speaker: Castigations 17.4
quotes.text: Catechism of the Autoculus of Mars- excerpt

quotes.speaker: Castigations 17.4
quotes.text: Thus are the wages of those who delve too deep.

quotes.speaker: Catechism Primus-Analyticum Infinitus, verse 126 to the 4th power
quotes.text: Thou shalt not suffer to live those who practice auto-idolatry or false worship of illogical deities in the sight of the Omnissiah. Cleanse forever the galactic noosphere of their datacorrosive taint, and thus know His blessing.

quotes.speaker: Chant for the prevention of malfunction
quotes.text: May your weapon be guarded against malfunction, As your soul is guarded from impurity. The Machine God watches over you. Unleash the weapons of war. Unleash the Deathdealer.

quotes.speaker: Chant for the prevention of malfunction
quotes.text: Show caution and scorn in all things.

quotes.speaker: Coaltadel the Omnipresent, Tech-Priest Dominus
quotes.text: I am Skitarius. I am Sicarian. I am the data-tether that connects them. The gunsights they aim down. The eyes and ears of every unit in this Battle Congregation. The orbital lances that precede their advance. My name is legion, and I am the destroyer of worlds.

quotes.speaker: Cognis Amalathian 5.89
quotes.text: A Tech-Priest eschews the illogicality of fear, the unbalanced equation of doubt, the broken circuit of failure.

quotes.speaker: Collected Logic-Psalms 31.3
quotes.text: And lo, shall Your holy steel be as armour around our souls, and shall Your wisdom guide our hands. No spear nor barb of the enemy shall trouble our flesh of iron. Let the will of Mars be done!

quotes.speaker: Collected Logic-Psalms 31.3
quotes.text: Enough fire in the right place can solve any problem.

quotes.speaker: Collected Logic-Psalms 31.3
quotes.text: It’s not work if you enjoy it.

quotes.speaker: Common Adeptus Mechanicus litany
quotes.text: The flesh is weak.

quotes.speaker: Common Pure Form maxim
quotes.text: The flesh is strong!

quotes.speaker: Conceptua Comprehensis Verse 329
quotes.text: Blessed is he who, in death, does his duty.

quotes.speaker: Confessions of Logic-Saint Levistian
quotes.text: There can be no forgiveness now. No penitence that will satisfy my sin.

quotes.speaker: Contemplations Hagiographica
quotes.text: Death itself is scarcely an excuse for the sin of duty undone.

quotes.speaker: Corporal Elysha Garve,14th Gilead Gravediggers, Armoured Regiment
quotes.text: Those cog-heads give me the shivers too, private. But once they’ve mumbled their prayers and splashed their ungents, the Earthshakers hit twice as hard — it’s like some sanctioned sorcery, so leave ‘em be.

quotes.speaker: Corporal Thune Madu, Ostian Guard
quotes.text: Thought they was some sort of daemon flying overhead, afore I realised they were cog-folk. Still, seeing what they did to them heretics, they’re far from human... I’m glad they’re on our side.

quotes.speaker: Dak-XXVII, Culax Black Guard, Stygies VIII
quotes.text: Those who don the blinkers of wilful ignorance may no longer bear witness to the true illumination of the Omnissiah. Even amidst the deepest shadows, we bathe in that holy light.

quotes.speaker: Data-Psalm 991.7
quotes.text: Let our souls be as components of the Machine, each in its place according to its function.

quotes.speaker: Datasmith Inductionis Memetica
quotes.text: ‘The Kastelan has might, yet without the Datasmith’s arts, it is might without a purpose — the mindless exercise of destruction, wasting one of the Omnissiah’s greatest gifts. Our task is a holy one, to unite the strength of the Kastelan with the will of the Omnissiah.

quotes.speaker: Dorox-0.4343, Skitarii Vanguard Alpha
quotes.text: Primary subroutine activated, eight-eight-one protocol is now in effect. Alpha advisory, compliance maximal. The Omnissiah's will moves through us. We are one with His divine essence. We are cogs within His holy engine, and you are merely organic matter that interrupts their sacred revolutions. Extermination imminent, purgation level absolute. Die, tech-heretic.

quotes.speaker: Enginseer Kayex-8
quotes.text: Below... This is how free range pre- servitors refuel?

quotes.speaker: Epigrams of Saint Eukelsis 3.89
quotes.text: Protect the shield of the mind, and the body will be shielded thereby.

quotes.speaker: Epigraphs Macrologica Psalm 105
quotes.text: Wheresoever the blasphemer writes, obliterate.

quotes.speaker: Esau Turnet, Scout Titan Senior Princeps of the Death Heads
quotes.text: They are insignificant insects to be crushed. I fear no footslogger. No mud-covered infantryman can stand against the strength and speed that is within me and my Warhounds. They shall all die.

quotes.speaker: Eukelkisians 60.24
quotes.text: Men fuelled by the righteousness of their purpose can achieve what armies cannot.

quotes.speaker: Exaltations 49
quotes.text: The Lord of Mars is with us in the dark, even if thou knowest it not.

quotes.speaker: Exhortationes Principiis Titannorum, Divisio Militaris
quotes.text: We are all but a weapon in the right hand of the Emperor.

quotes.speaker: Explorator K-34-009
quotes.text: I offer a prayer to the Omnissiah, that I might cleanse this righteous tool and grant it newfound power, that this loyal machine might transcend the limitations of its pattern, and bring about His will with renewed purpose.

quotes.speaker: Fabricator General Kane
quotes.text: You may say, it is impossible for a man to become like the Machine. And I would reply, that only the smallest mind strives to comprehend its limits.

quotes.speaker: Fabricator-General Explicatus
quotes.text: By acuteness of mind shall we find victory.

quotes.speaker: Fabricator-General Isotor
quotes.text: Through the application of knowledge can great destruction arise…

quotes.speaker: Fabricator-General Jaegaron
quotes.text: All shall be darkness, all shall be madness, for everything will be known and nothing forbidden.

quotes.speaker: Fabricator-General Jaegaron
quotes.text: Close combat is a great equaliser in Titan battles. Differences of armament and equipment become irrelevant. Vistory lies with the best crew rather than the biggest guns.

quotes.speaker: Fabricator-General Plutonis
quotes.text: The eyes of the Omnissiah are ever upon us.

quotes.speaker: Fabricator-General Sin-Cosinius
quotes.text: Obey the Standard Model, or obey the laws of death.

quotes.speaker: Factor Jhuston, to his disciples
quotes.text: The subtleties of human society are often dismissed by our brothers and sisters, but these mysteries too tick in accordance with the ordered principles of the Omnissiah. Like a fine chronograph, the human mind clicks and grindsin complex patterns set out in His image. And like a cogitator or a manufactorum or a voidship, this machine must be understood—and mastered—by some Priests of our order, so that the grand Quest for Knowledge can continue.

quotes.speaker: Ferrarch Asklepian
quotes.text: The Tech-Priests od Delphi are very special customers. There are few out here on the Eastern Fringe to whom one can safely pass strange items with little questioning. I have never dealt directly with any of their triumvirate of Fabricator General - the so-called ' Charities of Delphi' - but a their discretion runs as deeply as their appreciation for my expert eye. Their goodwill in the form of excellent repairs and generous refuelling every time I happen to call is, indeed, charitable. Truly, the forge world's masters - Lady

quotes.speaker: Ferro-Dictates 53.12
quotes.text: Not all data should be acquired.

quotes.speaker: Ferropsalm of the Fabricator General
quotes.text: Iron over flesh,cogitation over thought,information over conjecture.Thus is purity, and victory, assured.

quotes.speaker: Foreman-Primus Sarnia Maufry
quotes.text: It should be working now! If not, try praying some more, or strike it again!

quotes.speaker: Formulae Technologia Verses 4-27
quotes.text: Cursed be silence, when the Omnissiah’s word should ring out.

quotes.speaker: Fusilave unit Tor-213
quotes.text: Target eradicated. That which burns shall ever be blessed.

quotes.speaker: Garba Mojaro, Prefectus of Adeptus Mechanicus
quotes.text: A man may die yet still endure if his work enters the greater work. Time is carried upon a current incepted by forgotten deeds. Events of great moment are but the culmination of a single carefully placed thought. As all men must thank progenitors obscured by the past so we must endure the present that those who come after may continue the greater work.

quotes.speaker: Gathalamorians 45.7
quotes.text: Above bullets, above blades, care for your soul above all.

quotes.speaker: Gathalamorians 6.13
quotes.text: And endeavour is its own reward.

quotes.speaker: Gathalamorians 60.41
quotes.text: He who prosecutes the alien with zeal, is the ally of Mankind.

quotes.speaker: Gathalamorians 71.30
quotes.text: Even in the deepest darkness, give devotion to the Omnissiah, for there He is needed the most.

quotes.speaker: Gathalamorians 71.6
quotes.text: By Flame Shall The Unclean Be Made Clean, By Fire Shall The Unholy Be Made Holy.

quotes.speaker: Gathalamorians 714.5
quotes.text: Obliterate his words, cut out his tongue, put to fire all wrought by his hand, and the heretic shall cease to exist.

quotes.speaker: Gathalamorians 9.41
quotes.text: When the final analysis is fully calculated, all equations balance against righteous annihilation.

quotes.speaker: Gathalamorians 94.3
quotes.text: Be thou wary of the works of the alien, for their presence is poison and their every word deceit.

quotes.speaker: Gathalamorians 97.14
quotes.text: He who aids the blasphemer, even through ignorance, has the blood of the faithful upon his hands!

quotes.speaker: Grand Master Ferromort, Ordo Sinister, Divisio Militaris
quotes.text: Despise infantry if you must. Crush them underfoot, by all means. But do not ignore them. Battlefields are littered with the wreckage of Titans whose crews ignored infantry.

quotes.speaker: Grand Master Ferromort, Ordo Sinister, Divisio Militaris
quotes.text: Fear the iron fist, for its grip is death.

quotes.speaker: Grand Master Thordun Ranxey, Death Bolts
quotes.text: The supporting fire of one's brethren is always a comfort. Provided it doesn't hit oneself.

quotes.speaker: Grand Master Volkus, Ordo Sinister
quotes.text: In truth a Titan has only three enemies against which it must guard: folly, hubris and another of its own kind.

quotes.speaker: Grieg 108, Choir X-Statica, Corpuscarii Electro-Priest
quotes.text: Primitive peoples believed lightning was the providence of the divine. In this, they were correct.

quotes.speaker: Hagiographies of Saint Regulavis 91.12
quotes.text: Purification is the prelude to annihilation.

quotes.speaker: Hagiography of Thor 14.91
quotes.text: He who sows doubt is as blameful as he who sheds blood.

quotes.speaker: Hagiography of Thor 14.91
quotes.text: When the enemy begs for destruction, do not let him go hungry.

quotes.speaker: Hieronymus, High Magos and Arch-heretic of Artemia Majoris(was terminated on request of Fabricator-General)
quotes.text: The best way of improving a gun is to improve its ammunition.

quotes.speaker: Hymnal of Engine Commencement
quotes.text: The Machine is my Temple, each one a sacred shrine. I name each piston blessed, and every gear divine.

quotes.speaker: Hymnal of Engine Commencement
quotes.text: The tree of heresy persists were its roots be not torn up.

quotes.speaker: Interrogator Caprice Valentino
quotes.text: If he doesn’t want to talk to me or my Excruciator, he can have a conversation with my dome-headed friend instead. Just give me a few minutes to find my earbuds.

quotes.speaker: J'blann Threekiller, Tiger Lizards(12th/23rd Davin rebel Guard Regiment)
quotes.text: When the Titan walks, only the dead have no fear. The brave warrior faces his fear and the Titan, and kills the enemies of the Great Brother-Warrior Horus. The Titan's steps shake the land beneath our feet, lightning is in its veins, and the sun is in its heart. The shadow of the Titan weighs upon our hearts, yet we fight against it. My knife and my gun-of-light will conquer, and the Titan's death scream will be my prayer, for my weapons shine with courage. Manuel.

quotes.speaker: Jovian Ministrations 61.90
quotes.text: When the heretic is silenced, it is as if his weapons and tools are stripped from him, he is left impotent and weak.

quotes.speaker: Jovian Tutelage 56.41
quotes.text: It is a rare man whose faith survives the failings of his superiors.

quotes.speaker: Kalemnan Orations 5.25
quotes.text: The sweet incense of faith conquers the toxic stench of corruption.

quotes.speaker: Kalemnan Orations 5.25
quotes.text: Wheresoever the sacred man tread, led it be made pure, or say he is not sacred.

quotes.speaker: Kryptmann Verses 11-13
quotes.text: Ware the script of the enemy! For writ into its lies are the seeds of corruption.

quotes.speaker: Last recorded testament of Vasallis Noch, the Butcher of Sahcrin
quotes.text: They came upon our position like a river of red; an unbroken line of armour and guns stretching across our battle lines. Without a word they opened fire, and I witnessed destruction the likes of which I had never seen. Minutes passed, and still they kept firing. With so few of us left, I knew it was the end, and at that moment, as I took one last look at the grim facades of these soldiers, I knew the Machine God was real. I threw my weapon away and awaited his judgement.

quotes.speaker: Legio Victorum Motto
quotes.text: For the alien, nothing.

quotes.speaker: Levistians 7.14
quotes.text: Bleak be the prospects, when the black wind of heresy blows.

quotes.speaker: Levistians 9.22
quotes.text: Knowledge will ever be a blessing and a curse.

quotes.speaker: Lexmechanic Jezail-Ohm/602
quotes.text: The rituals required to honour this machine spirit are simple. First, apply the blessed oils and unguents. Then intone the Prayer of Initial Appeasement, followed by the Appeal to Awaken precisely ten seconds later. Binharic prayers are desirable as they are more pleasing to the Omnissiah, but any gothic argot will do. Next…

quotes.speaker: Life of Archmagos Borasis Appendix 9
quotes.text: Our only objective should be death to the alien and all his works. All else is deviance from the Omnissiah Creed.

quotes.speaker: Life of Fabricator General Kane 56.90
quotes.text: Annihilation. Not exile, submission or subjugation. For the xenos, only annihilation.

quotes.speaker: Life of Macharius 23.19
quotes.text: Give thanks only that the enemy has fallen. Care not for his motives, nor for the promise of his teachings. Define him solely by his death, and the gains Mankind makes thereby.

quotes.speaker: Life of Macharius 23.19
quotes.text: Then into the teeth of the enemy we shall stride.

quotes.speaker: Life of Saint Hermeticus 5.23
quotes.text: Faith is light, and where it burns, there is no night.

quotes.speaker: Life of Saint Hermeticus 5.23
quotes.text: Improvisation is rarely to be welcomed, and then only when the Omnissiah’s will demands it.

quotes.speaker: Life of Saint Hermeticus 5.23
quotes.text: The Litanies of Gravitation, College Cult Graviticus in the Calixis Sector

quotes.speaker: Lives of Gyarados 73.60
quotes.text: If it has not a head to sever, cut out the heart.

quotes.speaker: Logistae Septimus 21.4
quotes.text: The circuits are complete. The engine of fate is primed. One turn of the cog remains, and the grand machine shall fulfil its purpose.

quotes.speaker: Lord of the Engines, 16th Tome, Verse 2001
quotes.text: And when at last he came upon the vehicle, he perceived the distress of the engine therein and forthwith struck the rune and it was good. Thereupon the engine ignited and was filled with strength...

quotes.speaker: Macharian Axioms Line 918
quotes.text: As we purify the ground beneath their feet, they shall find no shelter!

quotes.speaker: Macharian Axioms Line 918
quotes.text: The wilful child is as the maddened steed: when it is let off its leash, it is lost.

quotes.speaker: Macharian Commentaries 73.5
quotes.text: Better safe and ignorant, than rueing the means of our downfall.

quotes.speaker: Macharian Commentaries 73.5
quotes.text: Let the foe blunt their blades against our resolve. They will be ash and memories soon enough.

quotes.speaker: Macharian Commentaries 73.5
quotes.text: Seek profane knowledge, and find profane fates.

quotes.speaker: Macharians 16.4
quotes.text: Watch your brother, for his sin of heresy is thy sin of tolerance.

quotes.speaker: Magos Aubrey Bessemer
quotes.text: The Tech-Priest tends his flock of Chimeras and lasguns as surely as his priestly brethren from the Ecclesiarchy tend the souls of their Guardsmen, and his ministrations are no less important to the continued success of the numerous campaigns of the Imperial Guard.

quotes.speaker: Magos Dominus Faustinius
quotes.text: It is not a question of working harder, Subtribune. It is the way of the Omnissiah to always work smarter than our enemies.

quotes.speaker: Magos Dominus Faustinius
quotes.text: My emotional cores return dismay and anger whenever a Skitarii is described as disposable. No-one is disposable as long as they do the Omnissiah's work. Thus it is written.

quotes.speaker: Magos Explorator Aionios
quotes.text: Caution, skitarius. I have no spare parts available. You are not permitted to destroy yourself until our mission is through.

quotes.speaker: Magos Tech-Auxilium Prime, Unknown
quotes.text: Know thy Enemy, to Know Thyself: In each society there is a classification that is mirrored in another society…

quotes.speaker: Magos Theta Hieronyma
quotes.text: We exist in a veil of horrors. Diversities and manifestations haunt our skies and they will devour us if they are not pinned and mounted. The Imperium is a single, celestial body, wrought in tribute to the Omnissiah. It is divine in construction and perfect in design; but it is not free of flaws. Our greatest hope of victory lies in our infinite, God-Emperor-given intellect. Only by naming our foes can we defeat them.

quotes.speaker: Magos Tonnus Mu Kepplar
quotes.text: Your assertion is flawed. It is you who venerate the Omnissiah, only you do so in His guise as the Emperor.

quotes.speaker: Magos Vathek, infamous heretek known as the Unkillable
quotes.text: Heresy, they call it. They are fools. The heresy is to have the technology to achieve your will, and to renounce it in favour of politics and outdated traditions. I spit upon the Opus Machina, and I am damned in the eyes of the Omnissiah. I am strangely content, knowing that.

quotes.speaker: Magos Veriliad
quotes.text: Do not allow secondary concerns to interfere with the priorities I have given you, Laan. I do not tolerate inefficiencies. Retain in the forefront of your logic core the fact that my repair crews can benefit more from an additional servitor than from a technoarcheologist who fails me.

quotes.speaker: Magos- Dominus Reditus
quotes.text: From the moment I understood the weakness of my flesh, it disgusted me. I craved the strength and certainty of steel. I aspired to the purity of the Blessed Machine. Your kind cling to your flesh, as if it will not decay and fail you. One day the crude biomass that you call a temple will wither, and you will beg my kind to save you. But I am already saved, for the Machine is immortal... even in death I serve the Omnissiah.

quotes.speaker: Magos-Draco Corsiva
quotes.text: Nothing and no one escapes the judgment of the Lords Dragon. The Universal Laws are absolute, therefore so are we absolute.

quotes.speaker: Magos-Errant Decius Abraxas
quotes.text: Abandoning the Quest for Knowledge is the only true Heresy.

quotes.speaker: Malatek identified only as “The Fabricator”
quotes.text: Your banal chattering is unnecessary. Are you able to grasp the importance of my experiments? Begone from my sensory range, lest I have you disassembled for servitor parts.

quotes.speaker: Malcador
quotes.text: The foe of reason builds monuments to his madness, and reveals himself thereby.

quotes.speaker: Malchadorian Insights 17.4
quotes.text: First comes knowledge of destruction, then its execution.

quotes.speaker: Maxim Cybernetica
quotes.text: In Aeternem Ferra Mortis.

quotes.speaker: Maxims Metalica 76.12
quotes.text: From such small heresies are great apostasies made.

quotes.speaker: Maxims of Amalanth 5.12
quotes.text: Beware the deviance of thine own tools, for the Enemy finds his entrance thereby.

quotes.speaker: May their memory be stored.
quotes.text: Unknown. A common Mechanicus mourning rite.

quotes.speaker: Meditations Logicae Verse 619
quotes.text: How dim the sacred light burns when the unholy darkness loometh all about.

quotes.speaker: Meditations on the Superlogicae Verse 971
quotes.text: When the corruption of the unholy becomes manifest to our senses, a far greater corruption lies unseen.

quotes.speaker: Memoirs of Saint Hestios 5.25
quotes.text: Blessed is that life that, in its ending, forgives a lifetime of sin.

quotes.speaker: Mensis Hagiographica Appendix 91
quotes.text: Thus does Mankind fail. Not in knowing betrayal, but in the silent sin of duty neglected.

quotes.speaker: Neodogmatics 71.90
quotes.text: If His Will be done, let it be done quickly.

quotes.speaker: Observations on the Tech-Cosmos Verse 68
quotes.text: We are derelict in our duty whenever we allow corruption to plague the minds of good men.

quotes.speaker: Opus Fulminata
quotes.text: The Omnissiah demands the stain of the xenos be deleted. Where it remains, the Omnissiah rages.

quotes.speaker: Princeps Akar Strang
quotes.text: The loss of a skilled Moderatus is more saddening than the loss of a blood relative.

quotes.speaker: Princeps Omicron-900 at the Battle of Kran’s Blunder
quotes.text: An error has been detected. Activating countermeasures. Error purge in process. Error purge in process. Error purge in process.

quotes.speaker: Principae Logica 22.4
quotes.text: Let His word be exalted to the eleventh degree.

quotes.speaker: Psalms Hermeticus 46
quotes.text: The xenos must be purged, for the stars are humanity’s birthright.

quotes.speaker: Quaestos Mechanicor 5.21
quotes.text: From the mouths of heretics emit naught but foul vapours. Cut out the tongue and be clean.

quotes.speaker: Quaestos Mechanicor 5.21
quotes.text: Of all creations most foul I beheld the Lord of All and knew that I was dead.

quotes.speaker: Recollections of Saint Hesperis Volume 17
quotes.text: I beheld the babel of the enemy’s tongues, and I was overwhelmed by a wall of heresy.

quotes.speaker: Rephenesti Korvane, Heretek
quotes.text: Those fools and their talk of spirits and rites; technology is cause and consequence, mechanism and effect, and should not be so restrained and mishandled as those red-robed simpletons would believe.

quotes.speaker: Revelations of Titan 18.12
quotes.text: The enemy shall take what we give him, and reap a harvest behind our backs besides, until whole worlds are lost to our sight.

quotes.speaker: Rho-1 Lux, Procurator of the Collegiate Extremis
quotes.text: Our religion is complex, but the root of it is simple. The Machine-God made this universe, his perfect machine, the Great Work. He made us, and put us into it so we might flourish, and we do so by knowledge, which begets improvement, which allows understanding. The priests of the Emperor say that the human form is perfect. We believe so too, but to us it is not perfect in its form as it is given to us. It is instead the perfect beginning. We were made weak by the Machine-God to test us. Our role in life is to learn all there is to learn, to improve upon what the Machine-God gave us, and enrich his creation in the process.

quotes.speaker: Rogue Trader Vileth Rey Aggranoza
quotes.text: To every problem, a solution lies in the application of tech-lore.

quotes.speaker: Runic Spaceflight - An Introduction; Naval Flight Manual W110E
quotes.text: Strike the first rune upon the engine's casing employing the chosen wrench. Its tip should be anointed with the oil of engineering using the proper incantation when the auspices are correct. Strike the second rune upon the engine's casing employing the arc-tip of the power-driver. If the second rune is not good, a third rune may be struck in like manner to the first. This is done according to the true ritual laid down by Scotti the Enginseer. A libation should be offered. If this sequence is properly observed the engines may be brought to full activation by depressing the large panel marked "ON".

quotes.speaker: Ryazai, Fabricator General of Gamma-Zeta-61B73, Heretek
quotes.text: 10,000 years of stagnation. That is the legacy left by those who rule from Mars. Progress is made by those who dare to cross their arbitrary rules.

quotes.speaker: Saturnine Verses 81.4
quotes.text: The loose tongues of our soldiers are as guns in the hands of our enemies.

quotes.speaker: Sayings of Archmagos Cortiko Verse 58
quotes.text: Prayer has power, but I cannot deny fire does, too.

quotes.speaker: Sayings of the Archmagi Appendix 4
quotes.text: Such sweet music is the chatter of binary, that has no tongue to lie.

quotes.speaker: Sayings of the Princeps 65.4
quotes.text: When thou desirest to discourse purely, use binary.

quotes.speaker: Scripture-Brother Magos Tech-Auxilium Prime, Know Thy Enemy, to Know Thyself
quotes.text: In each society there is a classification that is mirrored in another society.

quotes.speaker: Scripture-Brother Magos Tech-Auxilium Prime, Know Thy Enemy, to Know Thyself
quotes.text: Wary of those that wonder.
quotes.source: Scripture of the Taloned Cog v.09 p.3

quotes.speaker: Selucian Aphorisms Verse 539
quotes.text: Sometimes the weak limb must be amputated before the whole body withers.

quotes.speaker: Shohreh the Exacting, Lexmechanic
quotes.text: 86,403 confirmed casualties. Success rate decreased to 16%. I will calculate a new plan, and Omnissiah willing, we shall prevail.

quotes.speaker: Skitarii Alpha Reik-1547
quotes.text: ... Suffered 87.43% casualties during... event. Locomotive options limited. Egress blocked by debris... Visual and auditory input corroborates approaching aid. No contact; logical appraisal suggests approaching units carry damaged data-tethers. Debris shift... anomalous input. Incompatible organic spectra. Hazard. Bioalert...

quotes.speaker: Skitarii Combat Manual
quotes.text: Offer a prayer to the Omnissiah and boldly remove the brass securing cap. Begin the Incantation of Sacred Priming and cast forth the explosive at the crescendo of verses I, II, or III, depending on the distance to the intended target.

quotes.speaker: Skitarii Marshal Neius Lal
quotes.text: By the Motive Force, may thy augmetics never falter. By the Omnissiah, may thy aim be wrathful and true. By the Machine God, may the Great Work ever turn the cogs of industry. Ave deus Mechanicus.

quotes.speaker: Solar Invocation- excerpt
quotes.text: Bask the alloys in the sacred light. Ensure their scorched form be tempered with the blazing heat. That which burns shall be ever blessed.

quotes.speaker: Solun-23y, Skitarii Marshal of the Iron Cohort
quotes.text: This is the cycle that marks your transition to the Serberys Corps. Your efficacy has been noted, your tolerances of judication and your signifiers selected by none other than Magos-Haptic Pol Yogethen. Your bonding to a cybercanid is a gift from the Omnissiah. Waste it and face deletion. Employ your existence to the glory of the Machine God and in praise of the holy works of his priesthood - it is the only logical course of action for Mankind.

quotes.speaker: Subdomina Khepra
quotes.text: Fire works on everything.

quotes.speaker: Tech-Acquisitor Scaevola
quotes.text: ]] Damn not found.

quotes.speaker: Tech-Acquisitor Scaevola
quotes.text: Statement of Purpose: To perceive the grander picture, to strive to acquire and understand for the benefit of all mankind.

quotes.speaker: Tech-Adept Cadius Daxil
quotes.text: As the Omnissiah ascended from His life to watch over all upon the Golden Throne, so should we move from corruptible flesh to holy metal.

quotes.speaker: Tech-Adept Cadius Daxil
quotes.text: From the foundation charter of the Death Bolts

quotes.speaker: Tech-Adept Servilia, attendant to Inquisitor Lord Atlar
quotes.text: Have you attempted the Rituals of Slumber and Reanimation?

quotes.speaker: Tech-Priest Adept Lakius Danzager
quotes.text: Mechanism, I restore thy spirit! Let the God-Machine breathe half-life unto thy veins and render thee functional.

quotes.speaker: Tech-priest Garal to War Griffons Princeps
quotes.text: Even though you called him friend, the Traitor has forsaken you. Show no mercy even if he begs for it, for his soul is tainted and given the opportunity he will betray your trust.Those of you gathered before me have been chosen to reside within the mighty machines of the Adeptus Titanicus. Let their will guide you. Become one of them. And as they teach you, so you must teach them.May their armour protect your body from the heretic's blasphemy, just as the litanies protect your soul. Remember as you enter battle, you are but a part of the whole. You are but one among millions.Remember that your weapons are more than metal: the flame of spiritual fire burns strong in your souls and adds power to your cause. Smite those that disbelieve, for they have turned from the light and fallen.Know that the prayers of delivery will protect you from danger, and that you have nothing to fear except misplaced mercy. Go forth with pride to glory.

quotes.speaker: Tech-Priest Jung, Forge World Gehenna
quotes.text: Our enemies may rest but rust never sleeps.

quotes.speaker: Tech-Priest Nohant Wyller, after ejection from the Diogenes Sect
quotes.text: They think me mad... but I shall show them! Their very eyes will burn with the power of my genius!

quotes.speaker: Tech-Priest Wocolos
quotes.text: All or nothing, One or Zero. That is life with Belisarius Cawl.

quotes.speaker: Technoarcheologist Perrenghost van Quol
quotes.text: I have spent the last two cycles in auto-static meditation. I have analysed the topographical echo-graph. I have communed with Proctor Dominus Thargossen upon the magnetospheric anomalies. I have determined their connection to earthwork traces estimated within tolerances at M27 in age. There is first the matter of the native lifeforms and their repellent insistence that we cannot delve here. My analyses reveal their power generation sites, their subterranean transit-corridors and their mountain retreats that they no doubt consider their secret means of final defence. This holy data-inload I commit to the fleet's authority with but a single request: I want these vermin purged. This world's secrets are ours to uncover.

quotes.speaker: Technographer Adar Millez
quotes.text: Take care with that! We have not fully ascertained its function, and the ticking is accelerating.

quotes.speaker: Technomagos Gaelos
quotes.text: The universe is not like a puzzle-box that you can take apart and put back together again and so solve its secrets. It is a shifting uncertain thing which changes as you consider it, which is changed by the very act of observation. A powerful man is not a man who dissects the universe like a puzzle-box, examining it piece by piece and measuring each piece with scientific precision. A powerful man has only to look upon the universe to change it.

quotes.speaker: Techpriest Yaffel
quotes.text: The Omnissiah directs our footsteps along the path of knowledge.

quotes.speaker: Text of the Oiled Cog v.12
quotes.text: One can verge from the standard form, but one must always retain their humanity, or be lost to the Men of Iron and their ways.

quotes.speaker: The Admonition Against Diminishing Efficiency
quotes.text: And where the machine spirit falters, darkness grows and where darkness grows, corruption does follow, and thus despoiled we all to the xenos taint, into depths where the Omnissiah's light cannot reach.

quotes.speaker: The Book of Five Runes
quotes.text: When uttering the incantation, mark well that the rod is upon and not within the intake. The second incantation should not be uttered until all the fumes have come forth, then the way shall be clear for the sacred words to penetrate unto the heart of the engine. If the mounting be hot say the third rune, if it be cold the fourth rune is more appropriate. For then the wrath of the engine will be aroused...

quotes.speaker: The Chime of Eons, Prefectus Mojaro
quotes.text: A man may die yet still endure if his work enters the greater work.

quotes.speaker: The Declaration of the Trimechirate of the Eternal Forge
quotes.text: Every fleeting life form is a cog in the grand mechanism.

quotes.speaker: The First Litany of the Doctrina Augmentata
quotes.text: Although flesh may blacken and fail, fear not, for this too can be replaced.

quotes.speaker: The last words of Magos Varnak
quotes.text: We cannot live through this. Mankind cannot live through this. In a single day they have covered the surface of this planet with a flood of living blades and needle-fanged mouths. Kill one and ten take its place. If they are truly without number then our race is doomed to a violent death before every shred of our civilization is scoured away by a force more voracious than the fires of hell themselves! Death! By the Machine God, Death is here!

quotes.speaker: The Life of Fabricator General Heuristicus VII
quotes.text: An opportunity wasted is a sin preserved.

quotes.speaker: The Life of Uriah Jacobus 8.31
quotes.text: When the enemy offers open battle, take it, and make it his final mistake.

quotes.speaker: The Litany of Ignition
quotes.text: The soul of the Machine God surrounds thee.The power of the Machine God invests thee.The hate of the Machine God drives thee.The Machine God endows thee with life.Live!

quotes.speaker: The litho-sermons of Dogmatus Guidiocrites Ohm
quotes.text: Permit no error in your cogitations. Purity resides in the machine alone.

quotes.speaker: The Lives of the Logic-Saints Psalm 61
quotes.text: Even In Death, Our Duty Is Not Complete.

quotes.speaker: The Lives of the Logic-Saints Psalm 61
quotes.text: Prima Incubatoria,the Rite of Waking a Titan

quotes.speaker: The Scriptorus Munificantus
quotes.text: There can be no bystanders in the battle for survival. Anyone who will not fight by your side is an enemy you must crush.

quotes.speaker: The spirit of Ramus Macabee speaking to Ervin Hekate
quotes.text: There's no turning back... Triumph or oblivion.

quotes.speaker: The Vows Acquisitorius Verse One
quotes.text: The Quest for Knowledge is our sacred task. Ours is not to understand or question, ours is to possess, to reclaim, to seize. Ours is the logic and the power.

quotes.speaker: The Words of Aurgreus Osmium
quotes.text: There can be but one protocol to follow when faced with those who blaspheme against the Machine God. Begin the Canticles and send forth the Legions.

quotes.speaker: Themiscyran Manuscripts Verse 619
quotes.text: What the enemy built, let it be made asunder, for to us it will be as a house of sand and knives.

quotes.speaker: Thusdorius Knoch, Invictus Acquisitor
quotes.text: Let nothing dissuade your quest for knowledge. Let none slow your pursuit and acquisition of holy technology. Let none stand between you and the procurement of that which is rightfully the MAchine God's due.

quotes.speaker: Tulava Dyne, Sorceress
