For some, this reality makes them weep in despair, for others, it makes them laugh. I know the Emperor does neither. He looks upon us with expectation, and I shall not fail him.
quotes.source: War Zone Octarius - Book 1: Rising Tide, pg. 38

quotes.speaker: From a warriors' song of the Imperial Guard
quotes.text: The Emperor points, and we obey,Through the warp and far away.
quotes.source: For the Emperor (Novel)- Ciaphas Cain: Hero of the Imperium (Omnibus), ch. 4, pg. 86

quotes.speaker: Games Workshop: The Lucky 13s(saved archive page, dated 12 January 2008, last accessed 11 December 2022)
quotes.text: Although all documents surrounding the final fate of the original Mordant 13th- the "Lucky 13s" - have been sealed by order of the Inquisition, I, on behalf of the Cadian High Command, order another regiment to be mustered and given the name "The Mordant 13th". The psyker cadre that advises my High Command have divined, through the Emperor’s Tarot, that just such a regiment will be able to protect the Imperium from all of its foes. It is with all haste that this regiment be raised and trained. We need these men to be hardened fighters in the service of the Emperor before the year is out.

quotes.speaker: Games Workshop: The Lucky 13s(saved archive page, dated 12 January 2008, last accessed 11 December 2022)
quotes.text: Though our tanks and artillery are mighty, it is the vast ranks of Imperial Guardsmen that shall trample the enemy to dust - let them come.
quotes.source: Codex: Imperial Guard (5th Edition), Back cover

quotes.speaker: General Coron Grizmund, Narmenian Armoured
quotes.text: Let's give them hell, men.

quotes.speaker: General Coron Grizmund, Narmenian Armoured
quotes.text: Target and deny! By our deaths shall they know us!

quotes.speaker: General Karis
quotes.text: I don't care how bloody sanctioned they are, a psyker's a psyker, and anything to do with the warp is more trouble than it's worth.
quotes.source: The Traitor's Hand (Novel)– Ciaphas Cain: Hero of the Imperium (Omnibus), ch. 11, pg. 625

quotes.speaker: General Karis
quotes.text: I don’t know what effect they have on the enemy, but by the Emperor, they frighten me.
quotes.source: For The Emperor (Novel)– Ciaphas Cain: Hero of the Imperium (Omnibus), ch. 1, pg. 35

quotes.speaker: General Karis
quotes.text: Trust? Trust’s got nothing to do with it. I just don’t want them out of my sight.
quotes.source: For The Emperor (Novel)– Ciaphas Cain: Hero of the Imperium (Omnibus), ch. 10, pg. 167

quotes.speaker: General Sejanus
quotes.text: They have seen more death and ruin than another soldier sees in ten lifetimes.
quotes.source: Codex: Imperial Guard (3rd Edition, 1st Codex), pg. 23

quotes.speaker: General Sturnn, Commander Cadian 412th
quotes.text: Although the Golden Throne of Terra orbits a distant star far from here, the Emperor's hand is on your shoulders today. You have fought and displayed bravery and loyalty far and above your calling as Guardsmen. You have faced the full brunt of an Ork Waaagh! as well as stared down the horrors of the Warp in the fallen Space Marines, and in that I am honoured to have led you.
quotes.source: Dawn of War: Winter Assault Classics

quotes.speaker: General Sturnn, Commander Cadian 412th
quotes.text: To each of us falls a task. And all the Emperor requires of us Guardsmen is that we stand in line, and we die fighting. It is what we do best: we die standing.
quotes.source: Dawn of War: Winter Assault Classics

quotes.speaker: Gharan O'Hen, Army 212 Chief of Staff
quotes.text: They may spend every off-duty minute polishing their shiny boots and marching up and down the parade ground in perfect formation, but don't let that fool you. These men are steel-eyed, cold-blooded killers and I'd as soon have a platoon of them in my force as I would a company of other troops.

quotes.speaker: Governor-Militant Lukas Alexander, Commander 1st Kronus Regiment
quotes.text: Enemies of the Imperium, hear me. You have come here to die. The Immortal Emperor is with us and we are invincible. His soldiers will strike you down. His war machines will crush you under their treads. His mighty guns will bring the very sky crashing down upon you. You cannot win. The Emperor has given us his greatest weapon to wield. So make yourselves ready. We are the First Kronus Regiment, and today is our Victory Day.

quotes.speaker: Governor-Militant Lukas Alexander, Commander 1st Kronus Regiment
quotes.text: Fifth Company, this is the moment of truth. You will not fear. You will not falter. You will not give a single step to the enemy.
quotes.source: Dawn of War: Dark Crusade(Imperial Guard stronghold campaign) Classics

quotes.speaker: Graf Harazahn, Lord Marshal
quotes.text: One hammer blow will be all it takes. Place the men on alert, summon the reserves! We crush them here and now, for the Emperor!

quotes.speaker: Gregor Eisenhorn, Inquisitor
quotes.text: It remains a sad truth of the Imperium that virtually no veteran ever comes back from fighting its wars intact. Combat alone shreds nerves and shatters bodies. But the horrors of the warp, and of foul xenos forms like the tyranid, steal sanity forever, and leave veterans fearing the shadows, and the night and, sometimes, the nature of their friends and neighbours, for the rest of their lives.

quotes.speaker: Guardsman's traditional summation of the process of deployment
quotes.text: From The Guardsman's Duty, a popular ballad

quotes.speaker: Guardsman's traditional summation of the process of deployment
quotes.text: Hurry up and wait.

quotes.speaker: Gunnery Sergeant"Stonetooth" Harker
quotes.text: Back home, I once fancied me a pair of Catachan Devil boots. Killed me half a dozen of the great ugly critters but never found a single one that wore any!

quotes.speaker: Imperial Guard Tactical Manual
quotes.text: Hope for the best, but prepare for the worst.
quotes.source: The Traitor's Hand (Novel)– Ciaphas Cain: Hero of the Imperium(Omnibus), ch. 8, pg. 591

quotes.speaker: Imperial Warmaster Solon
quotes.text: Every position must be held to the last man: there must be no retirement. With our backs to the wall, and believing in the justice of our cause, each one of us must fight on to the end.

quotes.speaker: Jarn "Bullneck" Colda, Captain Catachan IX
quotes.text: Strategy Cards for Planetary Empires expansion game, card Home Ground - Minor Stratagem", (saved archive pg., dated February 2011, last accessed 6 October 2015)

quotes.speaker: Jarra Mordiker Commander, 13th/5th Support Regiment
quotes.text: Peace is not in my vocabulary.
quotes.source: White Dwarf 100 (UK), pg. 7 (republished as Warhammer 40,000: Compendium, pg. 91)’’

quotes.speaker: Jourian Eutar,Cadet Commissar
quotes.text: You are not required to think, only to act!

quotes.speaker: Knight Commander Pask, Cadian 423rd Armoured Regiment
quotes.text: Target sighted! Red Corsairs Predator left of the bunker. See the repair seam on the turret? Steady. Fire! Good shot. Driver, AT mines, steer left now. Gunner! Enemy infantry in crater, eleven o'clock. High explosive, fire! Sponson gunners keep an eye out, there's plenty more where they came from...

quotes.speaker: Kol ‘Gutting Knife’ Freen, Penal Legionnaire
quotes.text: We hit ‘em so hard half of them were still squatting on their latrines. Ain’t nothing in the galaxy that brings victory half as sure as killing the enemy before he knows he’s in a fight.

quotes.speaker: Kronin
quotes.text: And the heretic priests of Eidoline came forth, bringing false images for the praise of the lost people.
quotes.source: 13th Legion (Novel)- The Last Chancers (Omnibus), ch. Seven, pg. 208

quotes.speaker: Kronin
quotes.text: And they smote the enemies of the Emperor with a righteous fury, for they knew they were doing His work.
quotes.source: 13th Legion (Novel)- The Last Chancers (Omnibus), ch. Four, pg. 144

quotes.speaker: Kudubai Khan, Attilan Rough Rider
quotes.text: Strategy Cards for Planetary Empires expansion game, card "Forced March - Minor Stratagem", (saved archive pg., dated February 2011, last accessed 5 October 2015)

quotes.speaker: Lady General Jenit Sulla
quotes.text: For justice! For vengeance! For the Emperor!
quotes.source: For the Emperor (Novel)– Ciaphas Cain: Hero of the Imperium (Omnibus), Editorial Note after ch. 15, pg. 255

quotes.speaker: Lady General Jenit Sulla
quotes.text: Oh. Were there Tyranids on Corania? I guess I was just too busy with my needlepoint to notice!
quotes.source: For the Emperor (Novel)– Ciaphas Cain: Hero of the Imperium (Omnibus), ch. 2, pg. 50

quotes.speaker: Lady General Jenit Sulla
quotes.text: The most dangerous thing on the battlefield is a junior officer with a compass and a map.
quotes.source: The Traitor's Hand (Novel)– Ciaphas Cain: Hero of the Imperium (Omnibus), ch. 7, pg. 573

quotes.speaker: Lecturer-General Aldous, Scholam Progena
quotes.text: If you want a textbook example of righteous hatred, you need look no further than Commissar Yarrick. In him we see a man who justly despises his foes, and they in turn loath him.

quotes.speaker: Leto Barbaden, Governor of Salinas
quotes.text: When the people forget their duty they are no longer human and become something less than beasts. They have no place in the bosom of humanity nor in the heart of the Emperor. Let them die and be forgotten.
quotes.source: The Killing Ground (Novel),ch. 20; Codex Imperialis (Background Book),pg. 10

quotes.speaker: Lieutenant Kage, 13th Penal Legion
quotes.text: Marching through this green hellhole, getting slowly eaten by flies, drowning in our own sweat and choking on sulfur fumes? I can’t see why that’s not a good idea.

quotes.speaker: Lieutenant Karah ‘Boomstick’ Korbec
quotes.text: Look, I don’t care what blasted armour they have or how dug in they are. Give me and the boys the right explosives and we’ll have that pass clear by dawn.

quotes.speaker: Lieutenant Konarski, 933rd Death Korp of Krieg
quotes.text: We're the Death Korps of Krieg, son. Did you think that was just a pretty name? We never retreat. We fight and we die, that's the Krieg way.
quotes.source: Warriors of Ultramar (Novel)- The Ultramarines Omnibus,ch. 11, pg. 440

quotes.speaker: Llevrien, Aeldari Farseer
quotes.text: They have as much faith in their ignominious weaponry as they do in the shortsighted seer they call Emperor. But they outnumber us ten to one; underestimate them and they will bury you beneath the weight of their own corpses.
quotes.source: Wrath & Glory Core Rulebook (2nd Edition), pg. 60

quotes.speaker: Lord Castellan Ursarkar E. Creed
quotes.text: What do I ask of my officers? Merely that they do their duty with fire in their bellies and a prayer on their lips.
quotes.source: Codex: Imperial Guard (3rd Edition, 2nd Codex), pg. 50

quotes.speaker: Lord Castellan Ursula Creed
quotes.text: Duty and faith. Cadian and the God-Emperor. I fight for them all, as my Father did before me. So fight, my Brothers and Sisters, for as long as we defy the darkness, Cadia stands!'

quotes.speaker: Lord Commander Khartum
quotes.text: The greatest generals win before a shot has been fired.

quotes.speaker: Lord Commander Solar Macharius
quotes.text: Always endeavour to fight the enemy on your own terms. If you outnumber the foe use reserves to break through when the enemy's overstretched lines collapse. If you are outnumbered then concentrate your forces so that the enemy can fight only your best troops. If you are powerful at close quarters then engage in dense terrain where your advantage will prove greatest. If you are superior at long range then attack along an extended front. Remember always, however, that a commander who puts his faith in heavy weaponry will be easily outmaneuvered and a commander who relies on close combat without adequate support will lose his force to disciplined fire. No one has ever won a battle who failed to take advantage of his enemy's weakness, or take heed of his own.

quotes.speaker: Lord Commander Solar Macharius
quotes.text: I give men dreams and men are led by their dreams.
quotes.source: Codex: Imperial Guard (3rd Edition, 2nd Codex), pg. 9

quotes.speaker: Lord Commander Solar Macharius
quotes.text: Peace? There cannot be peace in these times.
quotes.source: Codex: Imperial Guard (3rd Edition, 2nd Codex), pg. 23, Codex: Imperial Guard (5th Edition), pg. 6

quotes.speaker: Lord Commander Solar Macharius
quotes.text: The meaning of victory is not to merely defeat your enemy but to destroy him, to completely eradicate him from living memory, to leave no remnant of his endeavours, to crush utterly his achievement and remove from all record his every trace of existence. From that defeat no enemy can ever recover. That is the meaning of victory.
quotes.source: Codex: Imperial Guard (5th Edition), pg. 13; The Killing Ground (Novel),ch. Fourteen, pg. 216

quotes.speaker: Lord Commander Solar Macharius
quotes.text: There can be no bystanders in the battle for survival. Anyone who will not fight by your side is an enemy you must crush.
quotes.source: Dark Heresy Second Edition Core Rulebook, pg. 16

quotes.speaker: Lord Commander Solar Macharius
quotes.text: What I cannot crush with words I will crush with the tanks of the Imperial Guard!
quotes.source: Codex: Imperial Guard (5th Edition), pg. 8 Warhammer 40,000 5th Edition Rulebook, pg. 59

quotes.speaker: Lord Commander Solar Macharius
quotes.text: What is the strongest weapon of mankind? The god-machines of the Adeptus Mechanicus? No! The Astartes Legions? No! The tank? The lasgun? The fist? Not at all! Courage and courage alone stands above them all!

quotes.speaker: Lord Commissar Barron Reed
quotes.text: It is their duty to fight and die so that Humanity might be perserved.
quotes.source: Magic: The Gathering's Universes Beyond Warhammer 40,000- Martial Coup

quotes.speaker: Lord Commissar Bernn
quotes.text: Drive me closer - I want to hit them with my sword!
quotes.source: Warhammer 40,000: Dawn of War II - Retribution Classics

quotes.speaker: Lord General Castor, Cadian 8th
quotes.text: A brave man will not fear enemy fire. But a smart man will not needlessly expose himself to it.
quotes.source: Warhammer 40,000: Dawn of War II - Retribution Classics

quotes.speaker: Lord General Zyvan
quotes.text: Competence on the battlefield is a myth. The side which screws up next to last wins, it's as simple as that.
quotes.source: The Traitor's Hand (Novel)– Ciaphas Cain: Hero of the Imperium (Omnibus), ch. Ten, pg. 611

quotes.speaker: Lord Marshal Ghanzorik
quotes.text: For every guardsman whose boots hit the ground, there is the sage that added his name to the tallies, the Enginseer that blessed his weapon, the priest that blessed his soul, and the countless others. It is these auxiliaries that will see him through to the completion of his holy duty.

quotes.speaker: Lord Marshal Toshenko
quotes.text: We shall wage this war with undaunted faith and courage. We shall not take one step back. This is the Emperor's world and we will not surrender it!

quotes.speaker: Lord Marshal Varnan Dreir
quotes.text: Life is the Emperor's currency. Spend it well.'

quotes.speaker: Lord Militant Tyleria Fylamon
quotes.text: Whatever we cannot destroy with our artillery, we will crush beneath the treads of our tanks. Whatever we cannot wither with massed firepower, we will drown in the blood of our ranks.
quotes.source: Wrath & Glory Core Rulebook (2nd Edition), pg. 60

quotes.speaker: Lord Solar Arcadian Leontus
quotes.text: Ours is the moment! March forward!

quotes.speaker: Lt Hal ‘Kisses’ Silo, Gilead Gravediggers, Weapon Specialist
quotes.text: You ever notice Orks smell different when they’re burnin’? Must be cause’ they’re made of different stuff, ya know? I swear, sets my stomach rumblin‘ every damned time.
quotes.source: Wrath & Glory Core Rulebook (2nd Edition), pg. 224

quotes.speaker: Macros Captain, Mordian IV
quotes.text: Where the hell are those throne-damned reinforcements? Get Kendrick on the vox. What do you mean there’s no signal? What in hell’s going on here?

quotes.speaker: Magos Aubrey Bessemer
quotes.text: The Tech-Priest tends his flock of Chimeras and lasguns as surely as his priestly brethren from the Ecclesiarchy tend the souls of their Guardsmen, and his ministrations are no less important to the continued success of the numerous campaigns of the Imperial Guard.

quotes.speaker: Major Elim Rawne, Tanith First and Only
quotes.text: A friend of death, a brother of luck and a son of a bitch.

quotes.speaker: Major Elim Rawne, Tanith First and Only
quotes.text: Gaunt? He’s a despicable bastard who left my world to die and one day I will slay him with my own hands.
quotes.source: Ghostmaker (Novel)- Gaunt's Ghosts: The Founding (Omnibus), ch. Two, pg. 271

quotes.speaker: Major Elim Rawne, Tanith First and Only
quotes.text: I've never liked you, Gaunt.

quotes.speaker: Mogul Kamir
quotes.text: It is not enough that I achieve victory - my enemy must suffer total defeat. It is not enough that I kill - all my foes must die. It is not enough that I succeed - all others must fail!

quotes.speaker: Morcar, Lord Commander
quotes.text: I had heard many rumours of the horrors of the mysterious Eldar. Of fire-clad daemons no weapons could harm. Of power-wreathed psykers who can tell your fortune and forecast your doom. Of winged warriors falling from the sky like rain and tall guardian warriors powered by the spirits of the dead. None concerned me. None held any terror for a faithful servant of the Emperor with the might of the Imperial Guard at his command. Non save their aircraft. When fighting the Eldar, watch the skies...

quotes.speaker: Mosstrooper"Reiv" Daggat of the 17th Drookian Fenguard
quotes.text: The Valhallans hate the cold as much as the rest of us, they're just taught that carpin' on about it gets the Commissars all riled...

quotes.speaker: Munitorum Battle Blessing
quotes.text: God-Emperor, infuse this weapon with your wrath, that I might deliver your righteous anger unto your enemies.

quotes.speaker: Nadine Hollum, Colonel(formerly),Convict
quotes.text: Mine was a political, rather than a criminal conviction. My crime was one of birth, of lack of influence, of competence, and of care for my men and the holy war materiel entrusted to me by the Departmento Munitorium. I was sent here not for dereliction of duty, but for performing the impossible and in doing so making powerful men look bad.

quotes.speaker: Nork Deddog, Ogryn Bodyguard
quotes.text: Da Sergeant Major asked me what my job was an' I said it was to, uh, do what I was told. He said I was a genius and gave me another medal. I likes da Imperial Guard!

quotes.speaker: Old artilleryman's maxim
quotes.text: Incoming fire has the right of way.

quotes.speaker: Old saying amongst Imperial Guard artillery officers
quotes.text: Infantry win firefights. Tanks win battles. Artillery win wars.

quotes.speaker: Parody of the Litany of Command, popular among Commissar Cadets
quotes.text: When in deadly danger, When beset by doubt, Run in little circles, Wave your arms and shout.

quotes.speaker: Platoon Commander Cyrus Jalili, Prandium Defense Auxilia
quotes.text: They're beasts! What are they going to do, bomb us from orbit?
quotes.source: Magic: The Gathering's Universes Beyond Warhammer 40,000- Starstorm

quotes.speaker: Popular Valhallan folk saying
quotes.text: It's never too late to panic.

quotes.speaker: Private Joanus Finks
quotes.text: Ugh! What happened to these guys! Looks like they've been sliced and diced.
quotes.source: Imperial Armour II - Ork, Eldar and Dark Eldar Vehicles for Warhammer 40,000, pg. 13

quotes.speaker: Regimental Primer
quotes.text: The most dangerous enemy is the foe within.
quotes.source: The Beast in the Trenches(Short Story)— The Wicked and the Damned (Anthology)

quotes.speaker: Sarvus Veknironth, Ratling Sniper
quotes.text: Never heard of a ‘Sarvus Veknironth’, Colonel. But if I see him, or your vintage amasec, I promise you’ll be the first to know.
quotes.source: Wrath & Glory: Forsaken System Player's Guide, pg. 114

quotes.speaker: Scrivener Quintus
quotes.text: Codicier Pryke raised the point that a significant credit value was attached to this installation, and that its destruction would result in a 0.017 per cent fluctuation in the mean commerce averages of the sector. She went on to suggest that an alternative strategy should be found. Colonel Kasteen said she was welcome to go outside and ask the Orks to go away if she thought that would help.
quotes.source: Caves of Ice (Novel)- Ciaphas Cain: Hero of the Imperium(Omnibus), Editorial Note after ch. Five, pgs. 348–349

quotes.speaker: Semper Fidelis
quotes.text: Imperial Marshal Delephrai- the phrase is used a as a valediction to the end of written military orders

quotes.speaker: Sergeant Alem Mahat, 229th Tallarn Desert Raiders
quotes.text: Doing the work of the Emperor is its own reward. But this is quite satisfying.
quotes.source: The Traitor's Hand (Novel)- Ciaphas Cain: Hero of the Imperium (Omnibus),ch. 19, pg. 741

quotes.speaker: Sergeant Gol Kolea, Tanith First
quotes.text: How many did you lose coming here?-Troops?-Family.-I didn't have any to lose. I don't know which of us is luckier.-Neither one, commissar. And that's the tragedy.
quotes.source: Necropolis (Novel)- Gaunt's Ghosts: The Founding (Omnibus),ch. 17, pg. 713

quotes.speaker: Sergeant Hektor Voss, Hyrkan 4th Infantry at the Battle of Blood Ridge
quotes.text: Nothing crushes the spirit of man! The Imperium overcomes—and WE ARE THE IMPERIUM!

quotes.speaker: Sergeant Lukas Bastonne, Cadian Shock Troopers
quotes.text: A good soldier obeys without question. A good officer commands without doubt.

quotes.speaker: Sergeant Mathilde Gorr
quotes.text: A shrieker cannon? Throne damn those Aeldari scum! Send in the Bullgryn, either they’ll run out of ammo or he’ll smash them to dust.
quotes.source: Wrath & Glory: Forsaken System Player's Guide,pg. 116

quotes.speaker: Sergeant Teodor Arinkev,berating new recruits recently arrived from Vostroya
quotes.text: Quiet, you dogs! Are you weak-willed agri-worlders, or are you first-born sons of Vostroya? If you receive an order, you act as if the Emperor Himself gave it!

quotes.speaker: Sergeant Tona Criid, Tanith First and Only
quotes.text: Who are you?

quotes.speaker: Sergeant Vladimir Brosk, Vostroyan 34th
quotes.text: Get me a mug of recaff and a lasgun, and I’ll take on a Hive Tyrant!

quotes.speaker: Sergeant- Ogryn Hrathlagg
quotes.text: Been on a death world once. That was a bit like home. Most places are better, though. And there's regular rations. We get more if the Emperor's really pleased with us.
quotes.source: White Dwarf 110 (UK), pg. 12 (republished as Warhammer 40,000: Compendium, pg. 49)’’

quotes.speaker: Tactica Imperium
quotes.text: A commander must have the courage to see his plan through, for good or ill. Wars are won and lost when the battlelines are drawn.

quotes.speaker: Talon Gunner
quotes.text: When your company has a Basilisk, every problem looks like a crater.

quotes.speaker: Tetrarchus, Lord Militant
quotes.text: The Imperium is a realm defended by sword strokes and the roar of guns: a million sword strokes and a roar like the thunder of angry gods pass every day, and yet it may prove not enough.

quotes.speaker: Training Manual, Penal Legion, Suicide Bomb Squads
quotes.text: Statistically, you will almost certainly die when assaulting a well-maintained fortress with a competent commander. You must strive to make your death useful.

quotes.speaker: Trooper Blaise,Kasar 18th Heavy Infantry Anti–Armour squad
quotes.text: A good Heavy can provide support to his squad-mates, deny an area,or put single shots on target all day and never run out of ammo. A great Heavy can drop a mortar shell into a renegade’s shirt pocket at a thousand yards.

quotes.speaker: Trooper Dermon Caffran, Tanith First and Only
quotes.text: I left my homeworld the night it died, and I've been fighting for its memory ever since. We Tanith are a dying breed. There are only about twenty hundred of us left. Gaunt only got away with enough for one regiment. The Tanith First. The First-and-Only. That's what makes us 'Ghosts', you see. The last few unquiet souls of a dead world. And I suppose we'll keep going until we're all done.
quotes.source: First and Only (Novel),Part Three: Fortis Binary Forge World, ch. Six

quotes.speaker: Trooper Gage Rorsche, 3rd Platoon, Alpha Company, Mordant 13th, "The Lucky 13s"
quotes.text: They’re sending us where? The want us to fight who? Well, I guess the Emperor knows what he’s doing, because those bureaucrats in the Administratum sure as gak don’t!

quotes.speaker: Trooper Malech 67th Tallarn Desert raiders
quotes.text: This tank is my home, my garrison, my bunker, my trench, and by the Emperor, she’ll be my coffin!

quotes.speaker: Unknown Commissar
quotes.text: Glory for the first man to die, charge!
quotes.source: Dawn of War: Winter Assault Classics

quotes.speaker: Unknown Commissar
quotes.text: Please try to run. It would save me lots of problems.
quotes.source: 13th Legion (Novel)- The Last Chancers (Omnibus), ch. Six, pg. 179

quotes.speaker: Unknown Guardsman
quotes.text: CAPTURING it was easy. HOLDING it will be hard.
quotes.source: Dawn of War: Winter Assault Classics

quotes.speaker: Unknown Guardsman
quotes.text: Concentrate all fire on that big bruiser!
quotes.source: Dawn of War: Winter Assault Classics

quotes.speaker: Unknown Guardsman
quotes.text: For every one of us who falls, ten more will take his place!
quotes.source: Dawn of War: Winter Assault Classics

quotes.speaker: Unknown Guardsman
quotes.text: Nah, soon as you're old enough you're sent to join the regiment. Colonel Stagler don't approve of educated men, says it was educated men that got Krieg bombed to shit in the first place. The colonel says that all a man needs to do is fight and die. That's the Krieg way.
quotes.source: Warriors of Ultramar (Novel)- Ultramarines: The Omnibus, ch. 6, pg. 358

quotes.speaker: Unknown Guardsman
quotes.text: Stop bleeding and fight back!
quotes.source: Dawn of War: Winter Assault Classics

quotes.speaker: Unknown Guardsman
quotes.text: Tanks! Where are the bloody tanks?!
quotes.source: Dawn of War: Winter Assault Classics

quotes.speaker: Unknown Guardsman
quotes.text: Those are Eldar? I thought they'd be taller.
quotes.source: Dawn of War: Winter Assault Classics

quotes.speaker: Unnamed Storm Trooper officer
quotes.text: Storm Troopers work best under maximum pressure, maximum intensity, and maximum danger. When these things are shared with others, they help form a bond stronger than any tie known in the galaxy.

quotes.speaker: Uttica 1st Tank Company motto
quotes.text: Victory is achieved through mettle.Glory is achieved through metal.
quotes.source: Imperial Armour - Imperial Vehicles for Warhammer 40,000, pg. 65

quotes.speaker: Valhallan proverb
quotes.text: Things can always get worse.

quotes.speaker: Verse III of the Janissary's Oath
quotes.text: In all things do we take the example of Saint Drusus, who the Emperor saw fit to return from death to continue service in His name. We endure hardships, as Drusus did. We show no mercy, as Drusus did. We drive back the darkness beyond His realm, as Drusus did.

quotes.speaker: Veteran Sergeant Hessel, 122nd Cadians
quotes.text: What I remember most about the battle for Vogen was the confusion and the colossal scale of death. We fought like heroes, like each building that had even one Guardsman inside was a fortress against the enemy. Every soldier, fighting in a basement or under the stairs, stood his ground alone and accomplished the task on his own. Because in cityfighting a soldier has to be his own general. He needs to be given correct guidance and the trust of his officers. On Vogen we had neither and how we survived was a miracle.

quotes.speaker: Veteran Sergeant Leo Lemuel
quotes.text: No, he was not a Saint. He was a man. A very great man, and in many ways a very wicked one.

quotes.speaker: Warhammer Monthly Issue 63, Inquisitor Grimm
quotes.text: Alone, we stand as bastions of strength. But when we fight side by side, we are a fortress of faith that no foe can overcome.

quotes.speaker: Warhammer Monthly Issue 63, Inquisitor Grimm
quotes.text: Weapons are not found only in the hands of a warrior. They are found in their blood, in the bones, and in their indomitable spirit. With such weapons, how can we fail to conquer?

quotes.speaker: Warhammer Monthly Issue 63, Inquisitor Grimm
quotes.text: You ask me when this great and noble work of ours will be done? I tell you, it will have its end only when we have divided every sentient thing in this vast and wide cosmos into one of two separate and primary orders of being: the Righteous and the Dead.

quotes.speaker: Warmaster Demetrius
quotes.text: I have at my command an entire battle group of the Imperial Guard. Fifty regiments, including specialized drop troops, stealthers, mechanized formations, armoured companies, combat engineers and mobile artillery. Over half a million fighting men and thirty thousand tanks and artillery pieces are mine to command. Emperor show mercy to the fool that stands against me, for I shall not.
quotes.source: Codex: Imperial Guard (5th Edition), pg. 7 Imperial Armour Volume One - Imperial Guard and Imperial Navy, pg. 159

quotes.speaker: Warmaster Macaroth
quotes.text: Show me men who know how to fight!-Follow me to the morgue, sir, and I'll show you plenty.
quotes.source: The Sabbat Worlds Crusade (Background Book), pg. 17

quotes.speaker: Warmaster Macaroth
quotes.text: With this act we have richly denied the Darkness and made trophies of its creatures. A dark lord is dead. So, this holy crusade, blessed by the Emperor, is advanced with glory.

quotes.speaker: Warmaster Menitus
quotes.text: You can waste as many Imperial Guard lives as you care, that’s your stupidity and not my responsibility.
quotes.source: 13th Legion (Novel)- The Last Chancers (Omnibus), Interlude between ch.s Four and Five, pg. 148

quotes.speaker: Zhaebin, Lieutenant, Vostroyan Firstborn
quotes.text: This planet is a hellhole, but it'll be an Imperial hellhole when we're through with it.---about the planet of Nectavus VI
quotes.source: FFG Teaser for "Jungles of Nectavus", supplement for Warhammer 40,000: Conquest(last accessed 3 March 2016)

quotes.speaker: Zoutah, Commissar, Catachan 'Wild Cats'
quotes.text: We draw the line here! Sergeants, pass the word out, we give no ground, we stand and we die in the name of the Emperor!
Burn the body; sear the soul
quotes.source: Codex: Chaos Space Marines (4th Edition), pg. 82

quotes.text: Death to the false Emperor!
quotes.source: Codex: Chaos Space Marines (4th Edition), pg. 4

quotes.text: Destroy, for the sake of DestructionKill, for the sake of Killing

Don't blame me for what I’ve done. I watched my wife and daughters die before me. It was death or embracing Chaos, and I knew that through Chaos, I might live. Live! It is life that matters and what I have learned is that Chaos IS life, for life is change and destruction and new forms, new mutations ever manifesting. We clung to the Emperor, a dying effigy, because He was all we knew. We feared life. We feared our own potential strength. The Imperium is dying. A slow death, but it’s dying. I did what I had to, that’s all. I opened my eyes and saw what a fool all of us were, bowing to a half-dead failure slumped on a throne. Haha! The blasphemy still sends shivers down my spine. It is the freshness of life. I am given to Chaos now. Now I truly live!
Ecclesiarch Dariya Ule, Lord Prefector of the Scholastica Psykana

For ten thousand years we have fought the Long War and our hatred still knows no succour. Those who have defied us shall feel the full wrath of Chaos. Mackan, Stygies and Avellorn will burn before our fury, Daemons will feast upon the soft flesh of innocence. Death to the False Emperor! Death to the weakling Imperium of Man!
quotes.source: Codex: Chaos Space Marines (8th Edition), pg. 123

quotes.text: I will follow a Corpse-God no more. I am free.
Impurity shall be our armourHate shall be our weaponImmortality shall be our reward
quotes.source: Codex: Chaos Space Marines (4th Edition), pg. 83

quotes.text: Kill me...
Kill us! Kill us all! In the name of Terra, before he--transcript of last broadcast from Ryxus V, the first world conquered by Heritor Asphodel
Let no good deed go unpunished.Let no evil deed go unrewarded.
quotes.source: Codex: Chaos Space Marines (4th Edition), pg. 84

quotes.text: Shackle the soul and forge the flesh. Bind the machine and butcher the rest.
quotes.source: Codex: Chaos Space Marines (6th Edition), pg. 34

quotes.text: Stand forth, Servant. The Sword you carry has been smelted in the heat of your anger, forged upon your desire, tempered in your hate, quenched in your soul, polished with your loyalty, furnished with your bones and skin, tested in your hand, and borne in my name. You Slave, are mine, as much as the Blade...
quotes.source: Realm of Chaos: Slaves to Darkness, pg. 90 - Chaos Weapons

quotes.text: The common man is like a worm in the gut of a corpse, trapped inside a prison of cold flesh, helpless and uncaring, unaware even of the inevitability of its own doom.

Their baying chills the heart and spreads icy tendrils of fear through weak mortal souls. And yet worse, yet more terrible to behold, are the huntsmen of this fell pack. Following close upon the Hounds, urging them ever forward, come deformed shapes, running and shrieking, driven by the insatiable blood-hunger of their kind. With twisted crimson bodies they stride across the blighted land, crouched over as if the better to track their prey's terror. Masters of the hunt, they seek the blood of Man to spill at the foot of their master's Skull Throne.
Victory needs no explanation. Defeat allows none.

Woe to he who hears the word of the Infernal Denizen of the Great Abyss, for his soul shall be tainted for all eternity. Better to die in eternal ignorance than to burn in the eternal fire.-The Apocrypha of the Seventh Seal
quotes.source: FFG Teaser to the "Enemies Beyond" - Supplement for the Dark Heresy Second Edition

quotes.speaker: Abaddon the Despoiler
quotes.text: Horus was weak. Horus was a fool. He had the whole galaxy within his grasp and he let it slip away.

quotes.speaker: Abaddon the Despoiler
quotes.text: I am the Arch-fiend, the Despoiler of Worlds, and by my hands shall the false Emperor fall.

quotes.speaker: Abaddon the Despoiler
quotes.text: I claimed this planet the moment I set eyes upon it. Vigilus is doomed, and the fools who toil in its defence are dead men.

quotes.speaker: Abaddon the Despoiler
quotes.text: Power comes in many shapes. But real power does the shaping.
quotes.source: Magic: The Gathering's Universes Beyond Warhammer 40,000- Worn Powerstone

quotes.speaker: Abaddon the Despoiler
quotes.text: The Emperor protects. Kill every last one.

quotes.speaker: Adrastus, Bodyguard of Captain Fenrix the Fated
quotes.text: In this galaxy, there is only war!

quotes.speaker: Ahzek Ahriman of the Thousand Sons
quotes.text: And what are the achievements of your fragile Imperium? It is a corpse rotting slowly from within while maggots writhe in its belly. It was built with the toil of heroes and giants, and now it is inhabited by frightened weaklings to whom the glories of those times are half-forgotten legends. I have forgotten nothing and my wisdom has expanded far beyond mere mortal frailties.

quotes.speaker: Ahzek Ahriman of the Thousand Sons
quotes.text: If the path to salvation leads through the halls of purgatory, then so be it.
quotes.source: Codex: Chaos Space Marines (6th Edition), pg. 60

quotes.speaker: Ahzek Ahriman of the Thousand Sons
quotes.text: Please forgive me the horror we both know you will make me put you through.

quotes.speaker: Ahzek Ahriman of the Thousand Sons
quotes.text: The fool, the coward, and the ignorant proclaim that the warp is a realm of unknowable peril and indescribable terror, that it is the hell of countless ancient myths and legends. This is a lie, told by those whose authority is based on lies, to keep the masses terrified of the unknown. The warp is limitless in power and its secrets are infinite; it is knowledge and strength, life and death, and the untapped potential to make and remake worlds. It takes only the discipline and the will to shape it; those who lack that clarity of purpose are liable to be shaped by it instead.

quotes.speaker: Ahzek Ahriman of the Thousand Sons
quotes.text: The only good is knowledge and the only evil is ignorance.

quotes.speaker: Algar the Blessed
quotes.text: These fangs, this armoured shell, these are as much gifts as this fine blade I wield.

quotes.speaker: Alpharius, Primarch
quotes.text: War is simply the galaxy's hygiene.
quotes.source: Legion (Novel),page after Dramatis Personae Codex: Chaos Space Marines (8th Edition),pg. 28

quotes.speaker: Amphion and Zethus, Word Bearers Sorcerers
quotes.text: With the thirty-seven keys of Tzeentch, we open the way for our brothers. With the thousand whispers of Slaanesh, we call to them. With the twelve plagues of Nurgle, we fell their enemies. And with the mighty axe of Khorne, we cut open the world for them.
quotes.source: Dawn of War: Dark Crusade, Prelude to Chaos stronghold mission Classics

quotes.speaker: Andrada,the Gore-Diva
quotes.text: We owe the Eldar a great debt of gratitude. If it were not for their voices, we could not have our choir. If it were not for their chisels, we would not have our blades. Remember to thank them when you run them through.

quotes.speaker: Angelica Benoit, Grand Marshall of the Free Systems Coalition
quotes.text: We live for Chaos so that we may die for ourselves.

quotes.speaker: Angron, Daemon- Primarch of the World Eaters
quotes.text: A million worlds, a billion battlefields, a trillion foes...

quotes.speaker: Apocrypha of Navis Nobilite, Excerpt
quotes.text: True knowledge of what dwells in the warp must be suppressed, for Mankind could not continue if they knew the truth about the horrors that exist upon the other side of the veil.

quotes.speaker: Ardent Grey,Master of Bladed Spire
quotes.text: “How can I even begin to explain to such a creature as you the ways in which I am superior? Blessed as I am, it is the mastery of my flesh and my mind which have separated me from the common man and granted me the right to bask in the glory of the gods themselves!

quotes.speaker: Argel Tal
quotes.text: Seven Months... Seven. Months. There are barely forty of us left. No food. We ate the crew... hateful mouthfuls of leathery flesh and dry bones.There was no water. Water tanks ruptured in the storm damage. We drank promethium fuel... weapon oils... engine coolant... Sire, we've been killing each other. We have been drinking each other's blood to stay alive.
quotes.source: The First Heretic (Novel), Part Two: Pilgrimage, ch. 12

quotes.speaker: Argel Tal
quotes.text: The difference between gods and daemons depends largely upon where one stands at the time.
quotes.source: The First Heretic (Novel), Part Two: Pilgrimage, ch. 14

quotes.speaker: Ashesh Kushal Siddhran, Pleasure Prince of Slaanesh
quotes.text: A hundred lifetimes of murder and still the thrill of combat calls to me.
quotes.source: Wrath and Glory Core Rulebook,pg. 342 Chaos Space Marine

quotes.speaker: Asteroth, Daemon Prince of Slaanesh
quotes.text: Long shall be your suffering. Joyous be your pain.
quotes.source: Daemonifuge (Graphic Novel Series), Book One: The Screaming Cage, ch. 3

quotes.speaker: Astropath Xhora
quotes.text: I see an angel in red, his eyes plucked from his skull and his wings torn from his shoulders. A hot wind blows from the north, bringing with it the scent of crushed lotus and rancid iron. I hear the drone of the blood wasp and the whisper of the third mad son. I see… I see… a warning!–Auto-crytaesthesicon transcript of the Astropath's last words, being slain hours later in a Chaos reaver attack

quotes.speaker: Aurelian (Novella), Part Four, ch. Nine
quotes.text: Rage without focus is no weapon at all. Take this lesson back to the Blood God.

quotes.speaker: Aurelius, Dark Apostle of the Word Bearers
quotes.text: Not everyone receives the attention of the Dark Gods. Only those who are demonstrably exceptional are worthy of their notice.

quotes.speaker: Ba’ar Zul the Hate-Bound, Warrior of Khorne
quotes.text: Your shrines will burn, your streets run with blood, your false idols shattered, your people slaughtered by the thousands, your very planet torn apart... and the barest fraction of my hatred will be satisfied.

quotes.speaker: Barlagst,Proprietor of Visceral Torment
quotes.text: A weapon unused is a weapon wasted.

quotes.speaker: Battlecry of the Berserkers of Khorne
quotes.text: Blood for the Blood God! Skulls for the Skull Throne!

quotes.speaker: Bellerophid, Scarlet Marquis of the Emperor's Children
quotes.text: Thrill in the noise that breaks the skin and ravages the mind! Savour the shuddering, shaking screams that shiver the spine and shatter the skull! Let sensation wash over you, through you, claim you and cast you aside!
quotes.source: Codex: Chaos Space Marines (8th Edition), pg. 48

quotes.speaker: Cachek the Deranged of the Writhing World,now deceased
quotes.text: Though the ground may open and devour you at any moment, that’s a small price for freedom in my eyes.

quotes.speaker: Captain Berzias, Iron Warriors Commander
quotes.text: Only a fool fights without armour. My hate keeps me strong, but my armour keeps me alive.

quotes.speaker: Captain Tarik Torgaddon, Luna Wolves
quotes.text: Throne, don't they ever stop? I must have killed a hundred or more of the damned things.

quotes.speaker: Cardinal Maurius Castille before his disappearance
quotes.text: We are finished, you and I. Because you are unjust, unfair, unkind. I will block you! I swear it! I will hinder and harm your so-called Imperium I will ruin your works, as you have ruined mine.

quotes.speaker: Cardinal Xaphan,Saviour of Vraks
quotes.text: The Dark Gods are our fears and our dreams made manifest. Their hungers are the same as humanity’s, simply on a far vaster scale.

quotes.speaker: Chaos Aspiring Champions
quotes.text: Do you hear the voices too?!!

quotes.speaker: Chaos Space Marines
quotes.text: Sanity is for the weak!

quotes.speaker: Chaos Space Marines
quotes.text: WE ARE THE DESTROYER!

quotes.speaker: Chaos Space Marines
quotes.text: We're back, and better than ever!

quotes.speaker: Clonelord (Novel),Chapter 6
quotes.text: Trust not the xenos, lest ye be mired in treachery.

quotes.speaker: Commander Phineas Gage
quotes.text: I swear to make war on the Imperium and its people, and I will go to my grave attempting to tear down the walls of that benighted, decadent, and foolish empire. It is not I, at long last, who have betrayed the Imperium, it is the Imperium who has betrayed me. It is the Imperium who has betrayed us all.

quotes.speaker: Constanze the Prophetess, burned as a Heretic 6875356. M38
quotes.text: A great storm of darkness will descend upon Baliaris Maior. A tide of destruction will sweep from the Citadels of the Great Ones and purge the naive ursupers who serve the Lost Emperor. The Blood Reavers will come, with death and misery as their companions. The faithful will rise from their hiding places to avenge the persecutions heaped upon them. The despair of the unbelievers willl bring forth the immortal minions of the Dark Masters. Great will be the slaughter, most pleasing will be the malaise of death, triumphant will be the forces of Chaos!

quotes.speaker: Constanze the Prophetess, burned as a Heretic 6875356. M38
quotes.text: Like the great storm of the Heresy, the forces of the True Gods will descend upon the False Emperor's minions. The stars will tremble at their passage, the mighty armadas of the Warmasters will bring annihilation to a hundred worlds. Great shall be the slaughter, most pleasing shall be the flow of blood. The fools who follow the Usurper Emperor will be brought low, forced to their knees amidst the corpses of their families and friends. The thrice-cursed one shall become as a living god, the power to destroy the Weakling Emperor shall be within his grasp. Know this, for these things will come to pass and the galaxy itself will be the spoils of victory.

quotes.speaker: Crull, Warlord of the World Eaters
quotes.text: By the Worm Eye that bleeds in all the dark places, by the wound that never heals... I summon you, Bloodthirster, from the darkest depths of the Warp!
quotes.source: Dawn of War: Winter Assault Classics

quotes.speaker: Crull, Warlord of the World Eaters
quotes.text: Know this! What will come to pass is no longer war! It is endless sacrifice in His name. Blood for the Blood God... let the universe drown in it!

quotes.speaker: Crull, Warlord of the World Eaters
quotes.text: Yes! Let the blood flow! I and I alone, will be Khorne's chosen... his favoured acolyte and prime among his champions. And on that day when the Titan is mine, you will all worship me as you do the Gods! Once the Titan is mine, I will crush entire suns in the palm of my hand. I will stride down the halls of the Heathen Emperor and I will grind him and the Golden Throne of Terra between my iron fingers! More! More blood for the Blood God!

quotes.speaker: Darius Khanan, Lord of the Blood Brotherhood
quotes.text: Honour your blades! Consecrate your guns!Anoint them with the hot blood of the strongest foes!
quotes.source: Codex: Chaos Space Marines (8th Edition), pg. 126

quotes.speaker: Dark Magos Celui Spehn,Master of the Platinum Forges
quotes.text: You call dare call us heretics? You can see nothing, your view too narrow to perceive the true glories of technology in all its myriad ways. Where was your Omnissiah when our sector was cut off and left for dead? In his absence we have learned there is more than the dictates of the corpse-god. We innovate while you copy. We discover while you entrench. We learn from all while you refuse to cogitate outside your petty enclosures. I would pity you, if you had any capacity to appreciate the emotion. In time you may yet realize your pathetic miscalculation, but by then we will be as gods ourselves.

quotes.speaker: Darvenorax, Champion of the Word Bearers Legion
quotes.text: Who can stand before the might of Chaos?

quotes.speaker: DeLes, Eldar Warlock
quotes.text: You claim to be a plotter beyond compare because your plan anticipates failure and turns it to success? When your failures put schemes into motion that in turn flounder, only to spawn new designs whose failure is all part of some master plot... then you still cannot master the schemes of the Changer of Ways.

quotes.speaker: Derod Nermi, despoiler of Abon IV
quotes.text: Kill them all, I do not want their loyalty, their service, their hearts, their arms or their goods.I want to hear their screams.

quotes.speaker: Diuman Cilious, Alpha Legion Sorcerer
quotes.text: What the thick-headed fools with their broken corpse of an Emperor fail to understand is that not only can they never defeat us, but they can not hide or flee or shield themselves from the triumph of Chaos. They are finite and we are unbound, undivided. They must not err, or they fall to heresy. All who fall join our cause. Every Imperial fool who dares to open his eyes is a willing recruit. They strive merely to hold back our fury and might, and it consumes them. Thus you can see Chaos is inevitable. We lurk not only beyond their grasp and at their gates; we lurk within the darkness of their souls, on the tip of their tongues, in their tortured dreams. We are them, but freed from the shackles of ignorance. We are them, grown strong... evolved. We are them, but so much more!

quotes.speaker: Eliphas the Inheritor, Word Bearers Dark Apostle
quotes.text: Abandon reason, know only war!

quotes.speaker: Eliphas the Inheritor, Word Bearers Dark Apostle
quotes.text: External Link: Eliphas the Inheritor (Chaos Lord) Voice Lines

quotes.speaker: Eliphas the Inheritor, Word Bearers Dark Apostle
quotes.text: Hear my warnings, unbelievers. Carried to your minds by the power of the Prince of Excess himself. We have raised altars in this land so that we may sacrifice you to our gods. Veterans of ten millennia of unholy war wait to grind you beneath the treads of their mighty boots. The chosen of Khorne hunger to add you to their bloody tally. The Blood God himself has marked this land, and will claim your skulls for his throne. There is no hope in opposing the inevitable. Put down your arms, unbelievers, and bow before the forces of Chaos Undivided.
quotes.source: Dawn of War: Dark Crusade Classics

quotes.speaker: Eliphas the Inheritor, Word Bearers Dark Apostle
quotes.text: Small steps corrupt.
quotes.source: Warhammer 40,000: Dawn of War II - Retribution Classics

quotes.speaker: Endemion, Captain of the Iron Warriors
quotes.text: Huddle close to your Emperor if he makes you feel safe. He cannot save you, for only Chaos is eternal.

quotes.speaker: Erebus, First Chaplain
quotes.text: A man can be convinced to do anything, no matter how abhorrent, with the right motivation.
quotes.source: Dark Creed (Novel), Book Four, ch. Eleven

quotes.speaker: Erebus, First Chaplain
quotes.text: Mankind's stoicism in the face of suffering is founded upon its ignorance of the alternatives.
quotes.source: The Horus Heresy - Legiones Astartes: Age of Darkness Legions, pg. 104

quotes.speaker: Erebus, First Chaplain
quotes.text: That which we foolishly call truth is only a small island in a vast sea of the unknown.For man to truly flourish, he must be willing to abandon the ever-shrinking island of such petty "truth" and surrender hismelf to the reality of that which is beyond.
quotes.source: The Horus Heresy - Legiones Astartes: Age of Darkness Legions, pg. 92

quotes.speaker: Excerpt from Book IX of the Sibylline Incitements
quotes.text: From the warp, power. But power alone is nothing without form or purpose. From desire, will. But will alone is pointless without the power to make those desires real. Only by melding the two can one find freedom from this cloying, stagnant reality.

quotes.speaker: Eylis Anilas,Arch-Demagogue of the Faded Host
quotes.text: A daemon is such a beautiful beast—a foreigner to the Materium and yet perfectly formed to rend fl esh and break the minds of men.

quotes.speaker: Eylis Anilas,Arch-Demagogue of the Faded Host
quotes.text: Antinichus, Daemon of the Bloody Blade

quotes.speaker: Ezorath Qu’rastis, Sorcerer of the Thousand Sons
quotes.text: Twist your enemy's deeds. Render his victories your own. Weave about him the strands of fate and providence until, with but a twitch of his strings, you compel your puppet to lie, to kill, and even sacrifice his own own life, in furtherance of the will of Tzeentch.

quotes.speaker: Fabius Bile, Lieutenant Commander of the Emperor's Children
quotes.text: Do we? Or is that another of those quaint superstitions that warp-brained fools pass along as if it were scientific fact? It is the height of folly to attribute motive to a random confluence of phenomena, Oleander. Slaanesh is not a who, it is a what, and thus can value nothing, least of all individuals.

quotes.speaker: Fabius Bile, Lieutenant Commander of the Emperor's Children
quotes.text: Each of the Legions has now nominated aspirants seeking to throw themselves upon our mercy in the vain hope that we may deem them worthy to join our ranks. Those loyal to the shrunken corpse on Terra still cling to their own processes by which perhaps one in a hundred neophytes may survive to become a battle brother. The methods I have developed over the last millennia are more stringent, for we must be pure in our hatred and hard of heart, body and soul. Fewer than one in every thousand survive, and I strive each day to lengthen these odds still further.
quotes.source: White Dwarf 278 (UK), Heroes and Villains of the 41st Millennium: Fabius Bile, pg. 68 Codex: Chaos Space Marines (8th Edition),pg. 165

quotes.speaker: Fabius Bile, Lieutenant Commander of the Emperor's Children
quotes.text: Follow me, my Children, and the glory of victory shall be yours. We shall cleanse ourselves in the crimson waters of our enemy. We shall bring the ecstasy of quick release to those who stand before us. We shall give bloody praise to the Lord of Pleasure and sing his name as we dance across the fallen. Follow me, my Children, and you shall taste the undreamt joys that lie beyond the bounds of mortal sense.
quotes.source: Realm of Chaos: Slaves to Darkness, Emperor's Children Army list, pg. 263

quotes.speaker: Fabius Bile, Lieutenant Commander of the Emperor's Children
quotes.text: Great art so often fails to find an audience with the intellect to appreciate it. Sometimes I am filled with woe to think that no one in this blighted millennium has the wit to see the scope of my brilliance.

quotes.speaker: Fabius Bile, Lieutenant Commander of the Emperor's Children
quotes.text: If a man dedicates his life to good deeds and the welfare of others, he will die unthanked and unremembered. If he exercises his genius bringing misery and death to billions, his name will echo through the millennia for a hundred lifetimes. Infamy is always more preferable to ignominy.
quotes.source: Codex: Chaos Space Marines (4th Edition), pg. 53

quotes.speaker: Fabius Bile, Lieutenant Commander of the Emperor's Children
quotes.text: Laugh if you wish, but know this – I have ways of maintaining the integrity of warp-spawn, however much they might wish otherwise. You might be nothing but a figment of delirium given solidity by a random confluence of interdimensional phenomena, but I will make you howl regardless. Even figments can bleed.

quotes.speaker: Fabius Bile, Lieutenant Commander of the Emperor's Children
quotes.text: Life finds a way.

quotes.speaker: Fabius Bile, Lieutenant Commander of the Emperor's Children
quotes.text: More than once I have questioned the Emperor’s wisdom in bestowing his gifts upon but one half of the human race. For in man, as in all beasts, the female is the deadlier of the species. You are a thing of furious beauty, my dear, and never let anyone tell you different.

quotes.speaker: Fabius Bile, Lieutenant Commander of the Emperor's Children
quotes.text: The Dark Gods and their slaves have nothing to offer me now, but I have far more to offer them
quotes.source: Codex: Chaos (2nd Edition), pg. 102 Codex: Chaos Space Marines (8th Edition), pg. 119

quotes.speaker: Fabius Bile, Lieutenant Commander of the Emperor's Children
quotes.text: The lesson is this. The only real crime for those of superlative intellect and great prowess is to allow one's self to become shackled by mediocrity. The crime is to let your grasp be less than your reach. To aim low.

quotes.speaker: Fabius Bile, Lieutenant Commander of the Emperor's Children
quotes.text: Unlike you, whelp, I once walked the same ground as your idol. I breathed the same air as him. And I tell you this, without lie or artifice. He never wanted to become what you have made him! He did not wish to be your god-thing. He abhorred such ideals! The slavery of your crippled, blind Imperium would sicken him, if he had eyes to see it.

quotes.speaker: Ferrous Ironclaw, Warsmith of the Iron Warriors Second Grand Company
quotes.text: We fight the long war, not through vain notions of duty and honour, but through a far purer purpose: hatred. At the height of our glory we were betrayed and cast out by our kin. Guilliman, Dorn, Sanguinius- these are names I curse. Horus, Perturabo, Angron- these are names I revere, names I would follow to the very end. It is this hatred that has sustained me through the long millennia. I tend it with bitterness. I nurture it with the deaths of my former brothers. For I know that when the end is upon us and Horus is returned, then the false emperor shall be cast down from his sepulchral Golden Throne, and we shall take our rightful place at the side of Horus, the true Emperor of Mankind.
quotes.source: Codex: Chaos Space Marines (3rd Edition), pg. 82

quotes.speaker: First Book of Indoctrination, Excerpt
quotes.text: The Daemon has many forms. You must know them all. You must tell the Daemon from his disguise and root him out from the hidden places. Trust no one. Trust not even yourself. It is better to die in vain than to live in abomination. The zealous martyr is praised for his valour, the craven and the unready are justly abhorred.
quotes.source: Codex: Daemonhunters (3rd Edition), pg. 8,Grey Knights Special Rules

quotes.speaker: Foeticus, Plaguewarden of Nurgle
quotes.text: Soft flesh and brittle bone. You will feel the Grandfather’s touch.
quotes.source: Wrath and Glory Core Rulebook,pg. 316 Plaguebearer

quotes.speaker: Gabriel Huang, Archdeacon of the Holy Oath
quotes.text: Celebrate the blessings of the Gods! They grant us the abilities to overcome those fools who would ignore their powers.

quotes.speaker: Gabriel Huang, Archdeacon of the Holy Oath
quotes.text: The corpse-emperor cannot hear your pleas, but there are others who are happy to grant your every wish.

quotes.speaker: Garlon Souleater
quotes.text: Your mind is a grimoire I can peruse at whim. Let us see what dark dreams can be leveraged to my advantage.
quotes.source: The Maelstrom: Lair of the Tyrant, Lair of the Tyrant, pg. 41

quotes.speaker: Gauwe Psgas
quotes.text: It is the fate of the weak to die unknown, and the destiny of the strong to rule for eternity. Give me glory, or give me death!
quotes.source: Codex: Chaos Space Marines (4th Edition), pg. 81 Codex: Chaos Space Marines (8th Edition), pg. 146

quotes.speaker: General DeLestt
quotes.text: They hide their faces in snarling iron, but the cruelty in their hearts is manifest in their brutal deeds. We are lost and we are done. May the God-Emperor forgive our failure and protect our souls.”

quotes.speaker: Ghadrax the Annihilator
quotes.text: Let the blood flow in a crimson tide. Let it pour through their meager fanes and drown their prating priests. Let it sweep away the Corpse-Emperor's pitiful armies and submerge his rotting worlds in an ocean of gore. So demands mighty Khorne, and so shall it be!

quotes.speaker: Ghargatuloth, Daemon Prince of Tzeentch
quotes.text: What is Chaos? Suffering, you might say. Oppression. Deceit. But could not all these things be said of your Imperium? You hunt down the talented and the strong-willed. You break them or sacrifice them. You lie to your citizens and wage war on those who dare speak out. The inquisitors you call masters assume guilt and execute millions on a whim. And why? Why do you do this? Because you know Chaos is there but you do not know how to fight it, so you crush your own citizens for fear that they might aid the Enemy. The Imperium suffers because of Chaos. No matter how hard you fight, that will never change. Chaos exists in a state of permanent victory over you - you dance to our tune, mortal one, you butcher and torture and repress one another because the gods of the warp require you to. The Imperium is founded on Chaos. My lord Tzeentch won your war a long, long time ago.

quotes.speaker: Glomar Rho, Brassmeister of Aleph Nine
quotes.text: All flesh decays, and all metal rusts. But the metal will last longer... long enough to see the corpse-god buried forever.
quotes.source: Codex: Chaos Space Marines (4th Edition), pg. 188

quotes.speaker: Gorius Nehrvan Conqueror of the Xheras Reach Worlds
quotes.text: The Corpse-King doesn't rule here any more. Your god has shrunk back from the darkness. This is my realm now. You worship me.
quotes.source: Codex: Chaos Space Marines (9th Edition), pg. 20

quotes.speaker: Graffiti linked to Helot Cults
quotes.text: Drudging classes of the Hive unite! Worker, let not the bounty of your labours line the pockets of the Guilders! To have more, we must take more. To take more we must know more! Free yourselves and look to the Serrated Star for your salvation!

quotes.speaker: Grekk Redye, Chaos Cultist of Tzeentch
quotes.text: This was my hand! It was ripped from my wrist three tithes ago in the teeth of a forging press. Our oppressors seared my severed stump so that I could remain at my station without bleeding to death. But look upon my hand now, sisters and brothers! It has regrown, and with more fingers than I could ever have hoped for. It is a blessing from the Great Saviour, and such blessings can be yours also. All that is required of you is faith.'

quotes.speaker: Greval Truchalt,Cult Magos
quotes.text: Long have the snivelling masses of mankind confounded our plans. Not today, my friends. Today the teeming billions of this world will be our instrument of victory!

quotes.speaker: Grimspyre, Daemon of Khorne
quotes.text: You have caused us great discomfort, little flea... And I feel inclined to scratch.
quotes.source: Daemonifuge (Graphic Novel Series),Book One: The Screaming Cage,ch. 3

quotes.speaker: Haakor of the Black Legion
quotes.text: Butcher your enemy's warriors without mercy. Crush his armies and leave none alive. But do not stop there. Burn his cities. Bomb his worlds from orbit. Slaughter everything and everyone until he kneels in the ashes of those he sought to protect. Only then will he understand the true fury of the Dark Gods.

quotes.speaker: Haarken Worldclaimer, Chaos Lord of Gloomtalons
quotes.text: Warmaster. The Spirit has been stricken amidships. The weak fool at its helm has ordered flight into the warp, likely using the attack to claim our flagship for himself. We must return, or risk losing it forever!

quotes.speaker: Harda’al,of the Prophets of the Blighted Path
quotes.text: Something slumbered in the darkness of that world, something abhorrent, something anathema. That something has stirred; that something has arisen...

quotes.speaker: Harzhan, Dark Apostle of the Word Bearers
quotes.text: Cast down the idols! Destroy the temples! Slay the priests! Show these fools that they worship nothing more than a rotting corpse!
quotes.source: Codex: Chaos Space Marines (4th Edition), pg. 42 Codex: Chaos Space Marines (8th Edition), pg. 40

quotes.speaker: High Adept Sywethan of the Divine Path
quotes.text: I pity you, standing there with your cherished Wargear. How naive of you to think such trinkets can keep me from the power that is my birthright. I will wipe you from existence with a single thought.
quotes.source: Wrath and Glory Core Rulebook,pg. 339 Rogue Psyker

quotes.speaker: High Inquisitor Bronislaw Czevak, Ordo Xenos
quotes.text: Chaos cannot be turned against Chaos, proud Relictor. You are less a heretic than an imbecile if you believe that. The Dark Powers know your desire to use their sacrilegious tools; they exploit and manipulate it for their own ends - even in the loyal subjects of the Imperium.
quotes.source: Atlas Infernal (Novel), Act I, Canto III

quotes.speaker: High Inquisitor Bronislaw Czevak, Ordo Xenos
quotes.text: If my time in the Black Library taught me anything it was - rather controversially - that Chaos is already very much part of us. It deals in the currency of mortal souls and feeds off states and emotions that are in essence natural. Without us there would be no Chaos. Good and evil? Right and wrong? These are binary oppositions that the inhabitants of this galaxy use to comfort and define themselves. I'm afraid much of the God-Emperor's work is done in the grey area in between.

quotes.speaker: Honat, Lieutenant of the Mordian Iron Guard 349th,executed for cowardice after the loss of his platoon,concerning Chaos Space Marines
quotes.text: It was fury! It was death! Hatred clad in steel! War bound in flesh! Before it, we could do nothing. Nothing but die.
quotes.source: Only War: Enemies of the Imperium, pg. 114

quotes.speaker: Honsou, Warsmith of the Iron Warriors
quotes.text: Beyond that opening are my enemies. Behind me are warriors who would happily turn their weapons on me if they thought they could get away with it. Do you really think I'm doing this to try and impress anyone? I know who I am, and I don't give a greenskin's fart what anyone thinks of me.

quotes.speaker: Honsou, Warsmith of the Iron Warriors
quotes.text: That's what you don't understand about me, Vaanes. I don't care. I do what I want because it is who I am. Anything else is a lie and if there is one thing I can say of myself, it is that I will never compromise who I am. Not for the powers of the warp, not for the M'kar and certainly not for you. When death is a heartbeat away, I am truly alive. That's the only way I know how to live. What else is there?

quotes.speaker: Hordemaster Ghaneth
quotes.text: Let the Emperor send forth his zealous hosts. I have my own, blessed by the Lords of the Warp. Here I stand, and here they shall die!
quotes.source: Black Crusade Core Rulebook,pg. 320" Jericho Reach"

quotes.speaker: Horus
quotes.text: Let the Galaxy burn.

quotes.speaker: Horus
quotes.text: The creatures of the Warp are just "aliens" too, but they are not life forms as we understand the term. They are not organic. They are extra-dimensional, and they influence our reality in ways that seem sorcerous to us. Supernatural, if you will. So let's use all those lost words for them... daemons, spirits, possessors, changelings. All we need to remember is that there are no gods out there, in the darkness, no great daemons and ministers of evil. There is no fundamental, immutable evil in the cosmos. It is too large and sterile for such melodrama. There are simply inhuman things that oppose us, things we were created to battle and destroy.

quotes.speaker: Horus
quotes.text: The day will not save them. And we own the night.

quotes.speaker: Horus
quotes.text: When the traitor's hand strikes, it strikes with the strength of a legion.

quotes.speaker: Hyperlogus Phaevra, Lord Sensorium of the Silken Death
quotes.text: This is our time. Look upon the great wound in the sky if you disbelieve it. Fight us by all means, for we relish every stinging bullet, every slash of the blade, just as you might relish a delicious feast. But know this truth, and remember it as the night skies curdle above you – we have already won.
quotes.source: Codex: Chaos Space Marines (8th Edition), pg. 116

quotes.speaker: Imurah, Sorcerer Lord, Thousand Sons
quotes.text: You tiny grains of sand, prattling as you tumble. For a moment it seemed you might do my work for me, but alas I must finish this myself. Witness true power!
quotes.source: The Art of Warhammer Video Games, pg. 146, Space Marine 2

quotes.speaker: Ironhorn Belghar Great-tusk,before killing Elihm the Flenser, Militarum Traitoris warlord of the Dread Hounds
quotes.text: You call us ugly. You call us mindless beasts. You sneer at the thought of us, spit when you speak to us. You give us bones to gnaw upon and your every instruction is a task to humiliate us. You also underestimate us. We are stronger than you, faster than you, tougher than you, and have more stomach for the kill than you. That is why your warriors are dead, and why my aze is at your neck. Before you die and I feed you to my beastmen, know that we are the children of the Gods, not you, and for good reason.

quotes.speaker: Ivano Caroson,High Cleric of the Transcendent Eye
quotes.text: Cast off the lies of oppression. The True Path is before us. Open your eyes to the change made possible by the Master of Fates. Swap thankless toil for righteous service and you will be rewarded in gifts most holy.
quotes.source: Wrath and Glory Core Rulebook,pg. 338 Cult Leader

quotes.speaker: Kairos Fateweaver
quotes.text: That which was, will be. That which will be, was.
quotes.source: Magic: The Gathering's Universes Beyond Warhammer 40,000- Reverberate

quotes.speaker: Kairos Fateweaver
quotes.text: Tzeentch cares not what they were or what they become. Only that they change.
quotes.source: Magic: The Gathering's Universes Beyond Warhammer 40,000- Chaos Warp

quotes.speaker: Kaldemar Kursh, Red Corsairs
quotes.text: We burn their bastions and shatter their defence lines! We shall teach them to defy the will of the Tyrant!

quotes.speaker: Kalos the Ravager
quotes.text: Karazantor the Vile,The Traitor of Xian

quotes.speaker: Kalos the Ravager
quotes.text: No. No! Not the sarcophagus... Khorne damn you, you disloyal curs. JUST KILL ME!
quotes.source: Codex: Chaos Space Marines (8th Edition),pg. 78 Magic: The Gathering's Universes Beyond Warhammer 40,000,Helbrute

quotes.speaker: Kargos Bloodspitter, Champion of Khorne
quotes.text: Though the gates that stand between the mortal world and the immortal Realm of Chaos are now closed to me, still I would rather die having glimpsed eternity than never to have stirred from the cold furrow of mortal life. I embrace death without regret as I have embraced life without fear.
quotes.source: Codex Imperialis (Background Book), pg. 77 Codex: Chaos Space Marines (8th Edition), pg. ~100

quotes.speaker: Kasperos Telmar,Radiant King in His Joyful Repose Emperor's Children
quotes.text: I will not pretend to command your loyalty in this. Some of you will be eager to wet your blades and must do as the gods or your desires will. I will not seek to prevent you. Serve your desires in all things, and you will find your reward. Thus spake glorious Fulgrim, upon the fields of Terra. But, for those of you who are under my direct command, well... my desires take precedence.

quotes.speaker: Kataria Skol, Scrying-Wyrd of Blasted Station
quotes.text: What you do not understand is that I am the future of humanity, while you fools are its distant past. Let me show you mankind’s destiny.

quotes.speaker: Kazadin Yallamagasa, Dark Mechanicum biologis serving the Alpha Legion
quotes.text: It is said that the best weapon is one you never have to fire.-original author unknown

quotes.speaker: Khalos the Ravager,former Chaos Space Marine,now Hellbrute
quotes.text: No. No! Not the sarcophagus... Khorne damn you, you disloyal curs, just kill me. JUST KILL ME!

quotes.speaker: Khârn of the World Eaters
quotes.text: Kill! Maim! Burn! Kill! Maim! Burn! Kill! Maim! Burn! Kill! Maim! Burn! Kill! Maim! Burn! Kill! Maim! Burn! Kill! Maim! Burn!

quotes.speaker: Khol the Despoiler
quotes.text: Strip the bodies. It amuses me to use their own devices against them.

quotes.speaker: Konrad Curze, Primarch of the Night Lords
quotes.text: I have seen darkness, witnessed it in my dreams. I am standing at the edge of a chasm. There is no escaping it, I know my fate. For it is the future and nothing can prevent it coming to pass. So I step off and welcome the dark.

quotes.speaker: Konrad Curze, Primarch of the Night Lords
quotes.text: If music is nourishment for the soul, what then of screaming?

quotes.speaker: Konrad Curze, Primarch of the Night Lords
quotes.text: Your presence does not surprise me Assassin. I have known of you since your craft entered the Eastern Fringes. Why did I not have you killed? Because your mission and the act you are about to commit proves the truth of all I have ever said or done. I merely punished those who had wronged, just as your false Emperor now seeks to punish me. Death is nothing compared to vindication.

quotes.speaker: Kor Phaeron,Keeper of The Faith
quotes.text: Dogma is like tough meat. It is best well-chewed.
quotes.source: Fabius Bile: Primogenitor (Novel),Part One, ch. Eight

quotes.speaker: Kor Phaeron,Keeper of The Faith
quotes.text: Faith, hate, vengeance and truth; these are our tenets. Embrace them.

quotes.speaker: Kor Phaeron,Keeper of The Faith
quotes.text: Hate the xenos as you hate the infidel, as you hate the non-believer. Feel not mercy for them, for their very existence is profane. What right have they to live, those that are Other?

quotes.speaker: Kor Phaeron,Keeper of The Faith
quotes.text: Victory attained through violence is victory indeed. But when the enemy turns on itself—that is the essence of true, lasting victory!.

quotes.speaker: Kor Phaeron,Keeper of The Faith
quotes.text: With victories over others, we conquer. But with victories over ourselves, we are exalted. There must always be contests, and you must always win.

quotes.speaker: Ku'gath Plaguefater
quotes.text: Praise Nurgle! For the plague to have progressed so quickly, truly his blessing must be upon us!
quotes.source: Magic: The Gathering's Universes Beyond Warhammer 40,000,Dark Ritual

quotes.speaker: Kulvain Hestarius of the Death Guard
quotes.text: In the embrace of the great Nurgle, I am no longer afraid, for with His pestilential favour I have become that which I once most feared: Death.
quotes.source: Codex: Chaos Space Marines (4th Edition), pg. 10

quotes.speaker: Lesh'Jae'Thi'Hah, Keeper of Secrets
quotes.text: This world, this galaxy, all of it is ours to twist and corrupt as we will! Such elaborate artistry have we planned for the flesh and souls that you would, in your ignorance, gobble like mindless beasts. We shall cast you back into the outer dark from whence you came, for this reality is the plaything of the children of the Eye, and you have no place in it!
quotes.source: Codex: Tyranids (6th Edition)(E-Book Edition),The Fall of Shadowbrink,pg. 30

quotes.speaker: Lord Ingus Fell,Bringer of Decay
quotes.text: A chalice, brimming with corruption and brutality; it awaits but a strong enough arm to upturn it...

quotes.speaker: Lorgar, Primarch of the Word Bearers
quotes.text: Faith is the soul of any army; be it vested in primitive religion or enlightened truth.It makes even the least soldier mighty, the craven is remade worthy and through its balm any hardship may be endured.Faith ennobles all of the works the soldier undertakes be they so base or vile, and imports to them the golden spark of transcendant purpose..
quotes.source: The Horus Heresy Book Two - Massacre, pg. 136

quotes.speaker: Lorgar, Primarch of the Word Bearers
quotes.text: It's called treachery, Roboute. It works very well.

quotes.speaker: Lorgar, Primarch of the Word Bearers
quotes.text: Roboute... let the galaxy burn.

quotes.speaker: Lorgar, Primarch of the Word Bearers
quotes.text: The difference between gods and daemons largely depends upon where one is standing at the time.

quotes.speaker: Lucius the Eternal
quotes.text: Brothers! Welcome to the feast! Tell me, which among you will be the first course?
quotes.source: Codex: Chaos Space Marines (6th Edition), pg. 62

quotes.speaker: Lugft Huron Blackheart, The Tyrant of Badab
quotes.text: Remind them that the Tyrant's big guns never tire.
quotes.source: The Maelstrom: Lair of the Tyrant, Lair of the Tyrant, pg. 32

quotes.speaker: Lugft Huron Blackheart, The Tyrant of Badab
quotes.text: The Imperium is a weak old man, ready and waiting to be broken apart by his vengeful sons.
quotes.source: Codex: Chaos Space Marines (6th Edition), pg. 58

quotes.speaker: Lugft Huron Blackheart, The Tyrant of Badab
quotes.text: The strong are strongest alone.

quotes.speaker: Lugft Huron Blackheart, The Tyrant of Badab
quotes.text: Though my guards may sleep and ships may rest at anchor, our foes know full well that big guns never tire.

quotes.speaker: Lyssa’har, Pleasureherald of Slaanesh
quotes.text: Your desires betray you, mortal. The lies of your heart are sweet as nectar on my tongue.
quotes.source: Codex: Chaos Space Marines (6th Edition), pg. 62Daemonette

quotes.speaker: M'kar the Thrice Born, Daemon Prince
quotes.text: The inferno of my vengeance fills you! It will burn you, my bearers of the holy word, it will fill your veins with power and fire until Ultramar is in ashes. As my power flows in you, so too will I see what you see, feel what you feel and know what you know. With each death I will grow stronger. With every fortress burned my reach will stretch further. You will be my army of dark righteousness. You will be the Bloodborn and your name shall strike terror into the hearts of men! Spread throughout Ultramar and take my fire to the Ultramarines! Burn them from their fastnesses until no trace remains. This is my holy word!

quotes.speaker: Magister Khalistim Bhewko
quotes.text: The Path to Glory is the path to destruction; yours, or your enemy’s...

quotes.speaker: Magnus the Red
quotes.text: Do you remember what you said to me, brother? Do you remember what you said to me as we fought before the Pyramid of Photep? Do you remember the words you used? I do. As I recall, your face was tortured. Imagine that - the Master of the Wolves, his ferocity twisted into grief. And yet you still carried out your duty. You always did what was asked of you. So loyal. So tenacious. Truly you were the attack dog of the Emperor. You took no pleasure in what you did. I knew that then, and I know it now. But all things change, my brother. I'm not the same as I was, and you're... well, let us not mention where you are now.

quotes.speaker: Magnus the Red
quotes.text: The minds of gods are not for mortals to know or to judge. Accept that Tzeentch has a place for all of us in his grand scheme, and be happy in the part you have to play.
quotes.source: Codex: Chaos Space Marines (4th Edition),pg. 37 Codex: Chaos Space Marines (8th Edition),pg. 133

quotes.speaker: Magnus the Red
quotes.text: We often say that the mind of man is his greatest weapon. Think how much greater then the mind of a Space Marine must be?

quotes.speaker: Magnus Thrice-fated, moments before his death by plasma fire
quotes.text: You humans are weak! See the strength of my arm, the might of my armour. How can you hope to match me?

quotes.speaker: Magos Caine of the Five-Fold Path
quotes.text: The path of the Omnissiah has left humanity dithering in the darkness, incapable of advancing on the paths of knowledge. Embracing the warp reveals technology that the primitives on Mars could never dream of wielding.

quotes.speaker: Magos Elizah Kaudge
quotes.text: Flesh and bone are weak and mutable, and yet the daemonic is ultimately insubstantial and impotent. To be master of both matter and energy, and blend this mastery with ultimate control of one's consciousness, is to achieve true immortality - neither confined by the material, nor divorced from it.
quotes.source: Codex: Chaos Space Marines (4th Edition),pg. 35 Codex: Chaos Space Marines (8th Edition),pg. 127

quotes.speaker: Malich, founder and sole member of the Burning Eye Legion
quotes.text: The gods permit me to tread my own path. Who are you to question them?

quotes.speaker: Maor the Scarred, Siege-Champion of the Scargivers
quotes.text: The Legionnaire that scoffs at a lasgun has not charged across an open field against a hundred of them.

quotes.speaker: Master Galan Noirgrim
quotes.text: Heresy is like a tree – its roots lie in the darkness whilst its leaves wave in the sun, and to those who suspect naught it has an attractive and pleasing appearance. Yet all the while the roots grow thick and black, gnawing at the bitter soil, drawing upon its nourishment from the darkness, and growing even greater and more deeply entrenched. Such is the nature of heresy, for it must be eradicated leaf, branch and root. It must be exorcised utterly or it will return all the stronger, time and time again, until it is too great to destroy. Then we are doomed.

quotes.speaker: Melothrucius Lux
quotes.text: Those who scale the pinnacles of glory have the furthest to plunge into the abyss.

quotes.speaker: Mikhail Hassid, Warlord
quotes.text: A man can only be measured by his deeds. Useless statistics cannot hope to reveal his true spirit.

quotes.speaker: Modrun the Fiendlord,before the Third Massacre at Adolorata
